title: Team Lead- Foundation Customer Facing
description:
Etraveli Group is a leading global flight technology provider, specializing in flight sales and offering flight content delivery and fintech products. We are here to solve complexity, by connecting millions of flights and travelers across the globe, from search and selection to trip and beyond.


We partner with major global platforms such as Booking.com, Google Flights, Skyscanner, and Kayak, providing seamless flight booking and related services. Our B2B portfolio includes a separate fintech entity with its flagship product, PRECISION, a risk management solution, Sweden’s leading flight comparison site Flygresor.se, Tripstack, our B2B Flights as a Service Provider and world leader in virtual interlining, and Wenrix, the embedded AI platform for flights. We also operate our own online travel agency brands including Gotogate, Mytrip, and Flightnetwork.


Every day we strive to make the world smaller for our customers and bigger for our people. Our diverse team of more than 3200 passionate professionals is what makes us the industry’s tech wonder and the best in the world at what we do.


Major offices in Sweden (HQ), Greece, India, Canada, Israel, Poland, UK, and Uruguay.

### **The Role**


As the Team Lead for the Foundation Customer Facing team, you are the guardian of the traveler’s journey. Our team sits at the core of the user experience, setting the quality bar for shared components and ensuring that every touchpoint a customer has with our brands is consistent, reliable, and high-performing.


You won't just manage a team; you will be the bridge between User Experience (UX), Customer Experience (CX), and our various Domain Teams. You will lead a group of talented engineers in building the standards and guardrails that ensure a coherent end-to-end experience for millions of travelers.

**Your Responsibilities**

**Vision & Alignment:** Align the team around a clear mission to create world-class shared components and experiences.

**Strategic Collaboration:** Partner closely with CX, UX, and Product Owners to ensure our foundational elements support the broader product strategy.

**Technical Standards:** Own the "quality bar." You will drive the creation of standards and guardrails that prevent fragmentation across the traveler journey.

**Stakeholder Management:** Work with multiple stakeholders to prioritize high-impact work and manage expectations across the organization.

**Team Empowerment:** Create a focused, "noise-free" environment where engineers can do their best work. You’ll mentor the team, foster a culture of continuous learning, and promote autonomous problem-solving.

**Ownership:** Take end-to-end accountability for the health and performance of the shared components our customers touch every day.

### **Requirements**

* **Experienced Leader:** You have a proven track record of leading development teams, preferably within a "Foundation" or "Platform" context where the focus is on shared services/components.
* **Customer-Centric:** You have a deep understanding of the customer journey and a passion for CX/UX principles.
* **Collaborative Architect:** You are skilled at navigating a matrix organization, building consensus across different domains, and translating high-level vision into actionable technical roadmaps.
* **Quality Obsessed:** You believe in standardization and have experience building or maintaining design systems or shared component libraries.
* **Strategic Prioritizer:** You are comfortable working with Product Owners to balance technical debt with new feature development, always keeping the "big picture" in mind.
* **Excellent Communicator:** You can articulate complex technical decisions to non-technical stakeholders and inspire your team with clear, concise goals.

### **Benefits**


At the Etraveli Group Gothenburg office, you will be part of +200 people, all with different cutting-edge skills and personalities. Our shared ambition, passion, and strong work ethic are what drive us toward the same goals. This foundation allows us to value our individual differences, which we believe are precisely what make us a strong team. With us you can enjoy:

* Our office is located in Merkurhuset in Gothenburg, a few steps away from public transport and lunch restaurants.
* We work on a hybrid-model where you can choose to work two days from home and you have two weeks per year that you can choose to work from a remote location
* We love gaming and after work activities.
* We know the value of personal development and continuous training.
* Hackathons and Dev Weeks - We believe in promoting creativity and trying new things.
* Healthcare allowance – Each employee receives a maximum allowable amount each year according to the Swedish Tax Agency to spend on health-promoting activities such as a gym card, massage etc.
* Pension and health insurance – Through partners we offer a comprehensive pension and health insurance so that you can get help quickly in case of an accident.
* Daily breakfast – To kick the day off just right, breakfast is available at the office every morning.

***As part of this recruitment process, we will be conducting background checks. You will be able to read more information and give your consent to this process in the application form.***

##### **Diversity disclaimer**

*At Etraveli Group we value diversity; we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds.* *During hiring, we are committed to ensure equality and promote diversity in the workplace at every selection stage. As such, we provide the same opportunities for all candidates regardless of race, religion or belief, gender, nationality, ethnicity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic protected under any anti-discrimination law or regulation.*


Department
Technology
Locations
Gothenburg
company_description: Etraveli Group is a global platform for flights, an air technology company with a presence across all continents.

title: Senior UI/UX Designer - Remote
description:
**Job Title:** Senior UI/UX Designer


**Job Type:** Full-time


**Location:** Remote


**Timezone Requirement:** Must have at least 4 hours overlap with PST


**Role Overview:**


We’re looking for a Senior UI/UX Designer who is obsessed with clarity, usability, and beautiful interfaces. You’ll own the end-to-end design of key product surfaces, from discovery and flows to high-fidelity UI, working closely with Product Managers and Engineers to ship world-class experiences.


This role is ideal for someone who can think strategically, execute with precision, and raise the design bar across the entire organization.


**Key Responsibilities:**


* Own product design from concept to execution across web platforms.
* Translate complex workflows into simple, intuitive user experiences.
* Create user flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity designs in Figma.
* Maintain and evolve our design system for consistency and scalability.
* Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to ship pixel-perfect UI.
* Conduct usability testing and incorporate feedback into iterations.
* Advocate for the user in product and roadmap discussions.
* Ensure designs are accessible, performant, and aligned with brand identity.

**What We’re Looking For:**


* 4+ years of experience in UI/UX or Product Design for web products.
* Deep expertise in Figma (components, auto-layout, prototyping, design systems).
* Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product thinking.
* Excellent understanding of UX principles, interaction design, and visual hierarchy.
* Experience designing complex SaaS or B2B products.
* Ability to collaborate cross-functionally with PMs and Engineers.
* High attention to detail and passion for pixel-perfect execution.
* Comfort working in fast-paced, ambiguous startup environments.

**Nice to Have:**


* Experience building or scaling a design system.
* Familiarity with frontend constraints (React, CSS, responsive layouts).
* Experience working in AI or developer-focused products.

title: Graduate Program – Tieto Banktech & Tieto Indtech
description:
Stockholm, Sweden


* Intern
* Delivery, Project and Product Management
* Hybrid
* Tieto Indtech

  
Job Description **Graduate Program – Tieto Banktech & Tieto Indtech**

**Kick‑start your career where technology makes lasting impact**


With strong Nordic roots and global capabilities, we are a leading technology company turning potential into meaningful outcomes. Guided by our values of openness, trust, and diversity, we work closely with our customers to develop digital solutions that help businesses and societies thrive—today and over time.


Whether you are a strategist, developer, analyst, or a future‑enthusiast, you will find opportunities to grow and make an impact with us.  



**One Graduate Program – Multiple Roles & Domains**


We are now launching a **joint Graduate Program across Tieto Indtech and Tieto Banktech**, offering graduates a structured start to their career while working in business‑critical environments within industry and financial services.


This recruitment round covers multiple graduate roles, but **all candidates apply through one job ad and one common application process**. Role matching will be done during the recruitment process based on your background, interests, and business needs.  



**The Graduate Program**


The Graduate Program provides:

* A structured introduction to Tieto, our culture, and our ways of working
* Hands‑on experience in customer projects and delivery teams
* Learning, development, and networking opportunities together with other graduates

Exposure to different domains, technologies, and professional roles  
* 

You will join the Graduate Program on a fixed-term employment contract, usually for one year. The program is designed to support your development and performance, and successful graduates may be offered a full-time role following the program, depending on individual results and business needs.

**What We Offer**


As part of the Graduate Program, you will receive:

* **Personal mentor and buddy** – support for both professional development and everyday onboarding
* **Strong learning culture** – access to learning communities, collaboration across disciplines, and continuous development opportunities
* **Community and network** – Nordic graduate networking, Young Professional activities, and social gatherings such as ski trips, travels, Christmas Party and more
* **Meaningful work** – contribute to solutions that impact millions of people across private and public sectors
* **Work‑life balance** – a flexible hybrid working model, competitive compensation, and a culture that values balance

You will be part of a workplace where people are respected and valued. Diversity and inclusion are fundamental to how we innovate and grow — come as you are and work the way you want.

**Graduate Roles & Backgrounds**


We are looking for graduates with a background or strong interest in **technology‑related fields**, including (but not limited to):

* Software development (e.g. Java, .NET)
* Data, analytics, or engineering
* Infrastructure, cloud, or platform technologies
* UX, design, and digital services

Business‑ and technology‑oriented delivery roles  
* 

You do not need to meet every requirement — potential, motivation, and willingness to learn are key.

**Who Are You?**


You may be a great fit if you:

* Have recently graduated or are about to graduate from a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree
* Have an educational background within technology, IT, data, informatics, information systems, business, design or similar fields
* Are motivated to learn and develop through a structured graduate program
* Enjoy working collaboratively in teams
* Are comfortable working professionally in **English and Norwegian/Swedish**

**Location**


We are recruiting graduates across several locations in Norway, and Stockholm Sweden. You will be able to specify your preferred locations during the application process, and we will match you with available graduate roles accordingly.


Current locations include: **Oslo, Trondheim, Bergen & Stockholm**  



**Recruitment Process**


Our recruitment process is designed to be fair, structured, and focused on potential:

* Application and initial screening
* Online assessments (sent to all candidates progressing in the process)
* Interviews with hiring managers and team representatives
* Background checks might be performed for specific roles


All candidates are assessed consistently across the same process, regardless of role or business unit.  



**Practical Information**

* Start date: **01.September 2026**
* Working language: **English**
* All application documents (CV and grade transcripts) must be submitted in **English**
* Online assessments are a required part of the process for all candidates

For applicants with ongoing studies, a preliminary grade transcript should be submitted  
* 

Please note that applications cannot be edited after submission.

**How to Apply**


Submit your **CV, motivation letter and grade transcripts** through **this application** by **Sunday 10th of May.**

If you are curious about starting your career through a structured Graduate Program and want to grow in an environment where technology serves society, we would love to hear from you.

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: Join our team to create purposeful technology that reinvents the world. For good.

title: User Experience Design Internship
description:
Above is looking for talented UX Design Interns to join the creative team based in our Stockholm or Malmö studio from August/September '26. Our internships are always on-site for best exposure to our processes and collaboration. We require a minimum duration of 6 months to really get to know each other, with a good possibility of continuing in a junior designer role.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a UX Design Intern you will be an integral part of our design team, shaping cutting-edge design and innovation projects for some of the world’s most exciting brands. You will have the opportunity to proactively contribute to all stages of the design process, from research to concept definition, from digital prototyping to crafting compelling experiences.
   

  

 Our work is exciting and diverse in nature, defining and crafting digital experiences for apps, websites and HMI within various different industries, from smart home devices, robotics, future mobility experiences, progressive healthcare solutions and many more. If you're curious to know more, don´t hesitate to apply!
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
* Someone with strong conceptual thinking and get existed by the unknowns.
* A fluid toolbox and “I can learn that!” mindset.
* User-centered design approach and experience performing qualitative users research.
* Aesthetic sensibility and able to express ideas and tell stories.
* Hands-on mentality and experience with AI-enabled workflows and prototyping.
* Like to take a holistic approach to product experiences across both digital and physical touchpoints. Interaction design knowledge is a plus.
* Work with a structured design process and rationale, making it easy for peers to understand and build upon your work.
* Most importantly, you are humble, self-driven and someone who thrives in multi-disciplinary project teams.


 This is not a 1-1 checklist, we are also very much interested in receiving applications from individuals that bridge disciplines or have unique profiles in-between the traditional molds - let’s talk!
   

  

**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware and software into meaningful experiences.
   

  

 We work with leading global and local brands and a collection of exciting startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals with diverse, international backgrounds. We support each other in doing meaningful, high-quality work and we believe you’ll bring that same spirit.
   

  

 Join Us
   

  

 Please submit your portfolio and short motivation letter. Interviews are happening on a rolling basis. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. Our internships are always paid, and we are able to offer support with visa & work permit processes for successful international candidates.
   

  

 We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

title: UX Designer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Strong understanding of UX design methodology and tools
* Strong knowledge of UI design and its impact on player experience
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, thriving in a cross-functional team environment
* Solid analytical skills, with experience using player data to guide design decisions
* Demonstrated interest in data and insights informed design approach
* A player-first mindset with passion for creating fun, engaging experiences
* Deep interest in and understanding of mobile games, particularly free-to-play (F2P) design
* Ability to rapidly prototype ideas and communicate concepts clearly
* Strong appreciation for UI/UX design and its role in enhancing gameplay


**Meritorious**
* Game Economy Design
* GUnderstanding of game monetization


**Application deadline:** 
 24-04-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: UX/UI-designer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 10 års arbetslivserfarenhet, under de senaste 15 åren, som UX/UI-designer omfattande både UX-design (inkl. användarintervjuer, användningstester, personas, kundresor/användarresor och informationsarkitektur) samt UI-design (inkl. typografi, ikonografi, färgsystem och designprinciper). Alternativt minst 7 års arbetslivserfarenhet, under de senaste 10 åren, som UX/UI-designer omfattande både UX-design och UI-design, samt högskole/universitetsutbildning 120p/180hp inom UX, interaktionsdesign, MDI eller motsvarande utbildning
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att arbeta som UX/UI-designer i tvärfunktionella team med agila metoder och verktyg (t.ex. User stories, MVP, Azure Devops, Jira, etc).
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att ta fram interaktiva prototyper i Axure, Figma eller motsvarande verktyg.
* Erfarenhet från minst två uppdrag med att bidra till eller utveckla designsystem
* Erfarenhet från minst två uppdrag av att arbeta med tillgänglighetskrav enligt WCAG 2.1 eller senare.
* God skriftlig och muntlig kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska.


**Meriterande**
* Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete som frontendutvecklare och/eller kravanalytiker
* Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet av UX/UI-arbete av applikationer i en IT miljö med mycket höga säkerhetskrav


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 dd-mm-yyyy
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: UX/UI Designer Intern
description:
**XR Solutions** 




**UX/UI Designer Intern — XR / AR Platform (Remote)** 




  





**About us** 




 XR Solutions builds augmented reality tools for industrial operations — from AR-guided maintenance to real-time remote support on factory floors.
 



  





 Our platform is used across industries like pharmaceuticals, automotive, mining, and manufacturing to reduce downtime and improve operational efficiency. We’re now expanding the product — and need a designer to shape how it works in the real world.
 



  





**The role** 




 This is not a “support” design role.
 



  





 You will take ownership of the UX/UI for our XR glasses platform — designing interfaces that technicians rely on in real working environments. This includes everything from step-by-step workflows to live AR collaboration tools and real-time data overlays.
 



  





 You’ll work across the full design process, from early research to production-ready design, in close collaboration with product and engineering.
 



  





 Remote to start, with the option to move hybrid later.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 



* Own the UX/UI design process end-to-end (research → concept → prototype → delivery)
* Design for XR environments (spatial UI, voice, gestures, eye tracking)
* Conduct user research and usability testing with real industrial users
* Build and evolve design systems in Figma
* Work closely with developers (Unity) to bring designs into production



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* Strong working experience in Figma (you know your way around systems, not just screens)
* Experience building and maintaining design systems
* Ability to work independently and make decisions without constant direction
* Clear, structured thinking and attention to detail



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience with AR / XR / spatial design
* Experience working with Unity or similar environments



  





**Important to know** 



* This is an
 **unpaid internship**
* High-performing interns are considered for a
 **paid role**



  





 We aim to make this worth your time:
 



 You’ll work on a live product, solve real problems, and gain experience in a space most designers don’t get access to early in their careers.
 



  





**What you’ll gain** 



* Hands-on experience designing for XR hardware
* Exposure to industrial use cases (not just consumer apps)
* A strong, real-world portfolio project
* Potential pathway to a full-time role



  





 Interested? Send us your CV. We'd love to hear from you.

title: Visual Designer to Savings & Investments | SEB, Stockholm
description:
At SEB, we create financial services that make a difference in people’s everyday lives - from savings and investments to payments and loans. We build digital experiences with high standards for quality, security and accessibility, and we believe in close collaboration between design, tech and business.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Visual Designer who wants to set a new quality benchmark for our digital experiences. You combine strong visual craft with UX understanding - and you enjoy working closely with development to ensure every detail is right all the way to production.
   

  

 Since SEB was founded in 1856, our focus on customers and long-term relationships has been at the heart of our success. We aim to drive positive change by providing capital to help everyone reach their goals and accelerate progress towards a sustainable tomorrow. As a leading financial services group in northern Europe, we'll help you grow and empower you to take on more responsibility to create a real difference. Welcome to SEB.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will join one of our product teams to quickly get close to user and business needs as well as deliveries. After the initial period, the assignment broadens - you will then have a clear mandate to elevate the visual experience and interaction quality across the entire product area. Our vision is to raise the visual experience across our Savings and Investments offering, with an expression that takes the overall look and feel to the next level.
   

  

 As a Visual Designer, you set the visual direction - from overall concept and composition to micro-details that make the experience feel premium in every aspect. You design interfaces, evolve components, and create a cohesive look & feel. The role combines visual design and interaction design, and you work closely with UX Designers and developers from idea to implementation.
   

  

 In this role you will drive both strategic design concepts and hands-on production and ensure what we build delivers high visual quality in practice, not only in Figma. You will play a key role in translating the brand into visual choices in the interface - tone of voice, details and overall feel.
   

  

 You will collaborate with other designers and teams to create consistent experience across the entire product area.
   

  

 In addition, you will also:
   

  

* Design screens and interfaces for our digital services
* Visualise ideas and concepts in Figma
* Create and further develop components and design systems that are built to scale and for everyday use
* Ensure the experience feels unified and well-crafted across colour, typography and components
* Design animations and micro-interactions
* Collaborate with frontend on motion, feedback and haptics
* Ensure a clear visual coherence and quality across the entire product area
* Explore and develop new design patterns
* Actively contribute to raising the product’s visual and interaction quality


 The UX Designer is responsible for defining problems, structuring solutions and ensuring customer value through research, flows and concepts. The Visual Designer is responsible for shaping the visual experience and evolving the interface through visual design, components, motion and interactions. Together, the roles ensure the product both solves the right problems and offers strong, cohesive experience.
   

  

**To succeed in this role, we believe you**
 You are a self-driven designer who is happy to take ownership of delegated design tasks, drive them from idea to delivery, and at the same time feel confident asking for guidance and feedback when needed. You care about quality - and about what we design actually working in practice, all the way from idea to an implemented interface.
   

  

 In addition, you also have:
   

  

* At least 5 years of experience in visual design or product design
* Strong understanding of visual design principles
* Experience in app design
* Very strong proficiency in Figma
* Experience working with design systems
* Experience with animations and micro-interactions is required
* Experience of product development in teams is required
* Experience with financial products is a merit
* Experience launching new products is a merit


**What We Offer**
 You will also be part of our design community of around 100 designers in different roles - a place for knowledge sharing, inspiration and developing design craft and ways of working. Here you will find colleagues to bounce ideas with, learn from and drive improvements together with.
   

  

**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than May 11th, 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact Lena-Marie Werdenhoff, Team Manager, at lena-marie.werdenhoff@seb.se or Madeleine Gustâv, Talent Acquisition Partner, at madeleine.gustav@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Product Designer - Music Experience
description:
**About Us**
 Soundtrack is a B2B scale-up company providing music streaming services for businesses. We serve small customers like the café around the corner, and much bigger brands like Joe & the Juice, Toni & Guy and TAG Heuer. On the inside, we're a bunch of talented, motivated and humble designers, engineers and music experts. We believe in product-led growth, where the product is the primary driver of customer acquisition, conversion and expansion.
   

  

**The Role**
 We’re looking for a Product Designer (UI-focused) to join our Music Experience team at Soundtrack. The Music Experience team is a key part of our product development and is responsible for how our users discover music and create playlists.
   

  

 As a Product Designer in the Music Experience team, you’ll work on a wide range of user-centric projects together with engineers, product owners, UI/UX designers, machine learning experts, researchers, music experts, and analysts.
   

  

 This role is UI-heavy but grounded in strong product thinking. You’ll work end-to-end, from early discovery and concept exploration to delivering polished, production-ready design in close collaboration with engineers. We’re looking for someone who doesn’t just refine ideas, but actively shapes them.
   

  

 This is a permanent role based in Stockholm.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Participate in product planning and discovery together with product and engineering
* Explore ideas and translate user needs and business goals into clear design solutions
* Create concepts, high-fidelity designs and interactive prototypes in Figma
* Deliver high-quality UI and ensure strong visual execution across the product
* Take designs all the way to implementation in close collaboration with frontend developers
* Contribute to and evolve our design system
* Drive visual consistency and raise the overall design quality in the team
* Work across both larger product initiatives and smaller, iterative improvements


**About You**
 You are a strong visual product designer who enjoys owning the full journey from idea to shipped solution. You’re confident in your craft, comfortable in discussions, and enjoy being an active contributor in a collaborative product team.
   

  

 You don’t just make things look good. You create thoughtful, structured and scalable solutions that improve the product experience. You’re proactive, self-driven and comfortable working closely with developers to ensure quality in implementation.
   

  

 You value in-person collaboration and want to be part of shaping both the product and the team culture.
   

  

**Requirements**
* 5+ years of experience as a Product Designer or UI Designer
* Experience designing apps and/or web applications, not only marketing or campaign sites
* Proven experience taking design from concept to shipped product
* Proficiency in Figma
* Comfortable working closely with engineers in cross-functional teams
* Strong communication skills and ability to drive your own work
* Fluent in English
* Ability to work from our Stockholm office at least two days per week


**Employee Benefits**
* We offer a flexible workplace with the possibility to work remotely
* Generous pension plan
* Yearly budget for health, wellness and personal development
* Laptop and mobile phone of your choice with included cellular subscription
* Regular social activities such as team events, meet ups, after works and off-sites
* Daily breakfast served at the office


 At Soundtrack, we believe that diversity fuels creativity and innovation. We're committed to building a team that reflects a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. We welcome applications from individuals of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, abilities, religions, sexual orientations, and identities.
   

  

 We reserve the right to close this vacancy early if we identify a suitable candidate before the application deadline. To ensure consideration, we encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible.
   

  

 Please note that we only accept applications submitted via our career page and do not accept applications by e-mail.

title: Product Manager
description:
**Going where no tech has gone before... into the wild** 




  





 Natlink's purpose is to save and protect people and wildlife. We build a Response & Coordination platform with three product lines:
 **WeHunt** 
 — Europe's largest digital hunting platform, used by hundreds of thousands of hunters to plan, track, and coordinate wildlife management activities. Our hardware brands
 **Tracker** 
 (GPS tracking devices) and
 **Burrel** 
 (trail cameras) complement the platform with devices built for serious hunters and wildlife professionals. A
 **Search & Rescue** 
 platform for coordinating mountain, forest, and ground rescue operations. And
 **HeartRunner** 
 — an emergency response platform that activates citizen volunteers for CPR, fire, drowning, and overdose events.
 



 Our mission is to make complex or time-critical events easy, secure, and meaningful to respond to and coordinate. We're a team of close to 100 people across Stockholm, Katrineholm, Oulu and Aurskog, with a steady yet growing presence across the Nordics, and with an ambition to enter into new European markets.
 



  





  





 PRODUCT MANAGER – WEHUNT HUNTING PLATFORM
 



  





  





 About the job
 



 We're hiring a Product Manager to own product development within our WeHunt platform – specifically the experiences around hunt planning and reporting. WeHunt is Natlink's largest and most established product, used by hundreds of thousands of hunters across multiple European markets. Your work will sit alongside other WeHunt value streams like dog tracking, wildlife population monitoring and wildlife traffic accident response, among others.
 



 You’ll work closely with engineering, design, and commercial teams to turn user needs into products that hundreds of thousands of people rely on – sometimes daily, sometimes when minutes or even seconds matter.
 



 This role comes with real ownership. You will define what to build and why, make prioritization calls, and be accountable for outcomes. You’ll work mainly with B2C users, but to some extent also B2G/B2B customers like police, municipalities, and hunting associations – which means balancing end-user experience with institutional requirements.
 



 AI is changing how products get built and how fast teams can move. We expect you to use it actively – in research, prototyping, writing specs, and shipping.
 



  





 What You’ll Do
 



 ●       Own hunt planning and reporting end-to-end: from discovery and prioritization through delivery and iteration.
 



 ●       Translate user insights, data, and business context into clear product decisions.
 



 ●       Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, and commercial stakeholders to ship products that work.
 



 ●       Define and track success metrics. Know when to double down and when to cut.
 



 ●       Use AI tools and workflows as a natural part of how you research, make decisions, prototype, build and ship.
 



 ●       Work alongside the adjacent WeHunt value streams to make sure the hunter's experience across the app holds together as one product.
 



  





 Who You Are
 



**Required:** 




 ●     4+ years of product management experience, or equivalent demonstrated scope of impact. You've shipped products real users depend on, and you can talk concretely about the outcomes.
 



 ●     Fluent with data. You define your own metrics, run your own analyses, and use them to make decisions rather than to justify them after the fact.
 



 ●     Comfortable making calls with imperfect information.
 



 ●     Strong communicator who aligns teams through clarity, not authority.
 



 ●     You actively use AI across your workflow and can show concrete examples.
 



 ●     Fluent in English.
 



**Bonus:** 




 ●     Hunting experience
 



 ●     Background in outdoor, wildlife, or adjacent consumer products, or experience in regulated or B2G contexts.
 



 ●     Conversational Swedish, Finnish, or French.
 



 ●     Experience with mobile apps or hardware-integrated platforms (IoT, GPS, cameras).
 



 ●     Technical enough to engage credibly with engineers on trade-offs.
 



 ●     Experience shipping across multiple markets with different regulatory and cultural contexts.
 



  





 What We Offer
 



 ●       A hybrid role based in Stockholm with flexibility for remote days.
 



 ●       Products with real-world stakes – our platforms contribute to wildlife conservation, hunting safety with a vision of zero accidents, and emergency response where faster coordination saves lives. The outcomes truly matter.
 



 ●       Ownership over products used by hundreds of thousands of people across Europe, with expansion into new markets underway.
 



 ●       A small, focused product team where your work has direct and visible impact.
 



 ●       The chance to shape how we build products in an era where the playbook is being rewritten.
 



  





 How to Apply
 



 Include your CV and a few sentences about why you're a good fit. We use Alva Labs assessments in this process.
 



  





 Natlink is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applications from all qualified candidates. Learn more about us at www.natlink.se

title: Grafisk formgivare, ettårig anställning
company: The National Board of Health and Welfare (Socialstyrelsen)
description:
Vi söker nu en skicklig grafisk formgivare som vill vara med och utveckla vår visuella kommunikation och vårt berättande. Som grafisk formgivare hos oss får du använda din kreativa och kommunikativa förmåga till att omsätta samhällsviktiga frågor till engagerande visuell kommunikation.
 



  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Som grafisk formgivare hos oss kommer att ta fram och producera visuell kommunikation för olika ändamål, målgrupper och kanaler. Utifrån olika behov och i olika projekt, kommer du att arbeta från idé och konceptutveckling till grafisk produktion för digitala och trycka medier.
 



 I nära samarbete med vår AD och grafiska formgivare bidrar du till att myndigheten har ett enhetligt visuellt uttryck och till vidareutveckling av vår grafiska profil.
 



 Du ingår i arbetsgruppen som arbetar med visuell kommunikation och samarbetar med kollegor på Kommunikationsavdelningen och i övriga myndigheten.
 



  





 Vi arbetar i pc-miljö, varför det är en fördel att du är bekväm att arbeta med pc och i den miljön.
 



  





**Om dig** 




 För att lyckas i uppdraget behöver du vara kreativ och utvecklingsdriven, lyhörd och lösningsorienterad. Du är bra på att skapa goda relationer och samarbeten. Dessutom är du pedagogisk och har en god kommunikativ förmåga. I ditt arbete har du god struktur och håller deadlines. Du trivs med och är bra på både att arbeta med snabba leveranser och att planera långsiktigt.
 



  





 Vid rekryteringen lägger vi stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som har** 



* högskoleutbildning eller annan relevant eftergymnasial utbildning på minst ett år inom grafisk formgivning eller informationsdesign
* minst ett års aktuell yrkeserfarenhet av arbete med visuellt berättande och grafisk formgivning som omfattar idé- och konceptutveckling till grafisk produktion för digitala kanaler, sociala medier och tryckt material
* dokumenterad erfarenhet av att arbeta med animationer
* stor vana vid att ta fram material i enlighet med en grafisk profil
* erfarenhet av att arbeta med målgruppsanpassad kommunikation
* mycket goda kunskaper i programmen Indesign, Illustrator, Photoshop, After Effects, Premiere Pro
* goda kunskaper i och erfarenhet av grafisk formgivning med god tillgänglighet
* goda kunskaper i Officepaketet, främst PowerPoint
* goda kunskaper i att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska.



  





**Det är meriterande om du har:** 



* erfarenhet av arbete med visuell kommunikation inom eller för kommun, region eller statlig myndighet
* kunskap och erfarenhet av UX
* erfarenhet av att fotografera
* god kunskap om upphovsrätt för fotografier och bilder
* erfarenhet av bildval och inköp av bilder utifrån bildspråk i grafisk profil
* erfarenhet av bildretuschering.



  





**Bra att veta** 




 Anställningen är en särskild visstidsanställning. Du utgår ifrån kontoret på Västerbroplan i Stockholm, men har möjlighet att arbeta på distans upp till 2 dagar i veckan. Våren 2027 flyttar myndigheten till nyrenoverade lokaler i Solna strand. Din tjänstetitel blir kommunikatör och din placering är på Kommunikationsavdelningen och Enheten för kommunikationsutveckling.
 



  





 När du ansöker får du besvara ett antal urvalsfrågor som är kopplade till kravprofilen i annonsen. Dina svar används som en del i urvalsarbetet och kan avgöra om du går vidare i rekryteringsprocessen eller inte. Det är därför viktigt att du svarar så utförligt och tydligt som möjligt. Vi använder inte det personliga brevet vid urvalet, därför bifogar du endast ditt CV.
 



  





**Som del i din ansökan** 
 vill vi att du delar din portfolio och exempel på grafiskt arbete du utfört och som publicerats. Du gör det genom att bifoga din fil i urvalsfrågan för det (max 30MB). Vi vill se:
 


* två sociala medieinlägg, varav ett rörligt
* en rapport, med exempel på omslag och uppslag, eller hel rapport
* två exempel på informationsgrafik, varav en animerad
* en PowerPoint-presentation
* en valfri UX-design.



 Berätta kort varför du gjort dina designval baserat på grafisk profil och användarcentrerad design. Vi ser gärna exempel på hur du arbetat med både fotografisk bild och illustrationer.
 



  





 Obs! Vi kan inte ta emot din portfolio via Dropbox eller liknande molntjänster. Se till att vi enkelt hittar exemplen vi efterfrågar.
 




  





**Om du går vidare till en första intervju** 
 kommer du
 


* att få berätta om ovannämnda exempel och ditt arbete, vad du gjorde, samarbeten du hade under produktionen samt om vägval i arbetet.
* **även att få göra ett arbetsprov,** 
 instruktioner får du inför första intervjun.



  





 Om du har frågor om tjänsten, kontakta enhetschef Britta Zaar Nyman på britta.zaar-nyman@socialstyrelsen.se. Vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta personalspecialist Marie Hansson på marie.hansson@socialstyrelsen.se. Facklig företrädare för SACO är Isabelle Ålander isabelle.alander@socialstyrelsen.se Facklig företrädare för ST/OFR är Anders Nordlund och nås på anders.nordlund@socialstyrelsen.se Samtliga nås på telefonnummer 075-247 30 00.
 



  





 Har du skyddad identitet? Kontakta angiven personalspecialist ovan.
 



  





 Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 18 april 2026.

title: Product Manager
description:
Over the past eight years we have provided smart tools that help put financial power back in the hands of the people – where we believe it belongs. Everything we do is based on one vision: to improve the financial health of our users - one credit at the time.
   

  

 So far, we’ve helped millions of users by refinancing expensive consumer loans. But we aim higher; new markets, new products and new ways of improving financial lives in an innovative way. As a Product Manager you will be responsible for our core offering joining a diverse scaleup environment with co-workers who are motivated, adaptable and committed to creating fantastic (we mean amazing) products.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
 We believe that everyone should get the interest rate they deserve, meaning that assisting our users with debt management will always be at the core of what we do. You’ll play a key role in shaping our core product (refinancing) while helping to explore and build new fintech solutions that people truly need. Together with a team of engineers, designers and other specialists, you’ll drive projects forward with focus, speed and a clear sense of ownership.
   

  

**Your Work Will Cover Things Like**
* Turning user needs into product opportunities and features.
* Supporting strategy by connecting product outcomes to business goals.
* Using data and insights to make smart decisions and run experiments.
* Coordinating with your team to keep roadmaps realistic, transparent and on track.
* Communicating progress and learnings across the company.


**Who You Are**
 We’re looking for someone who can make complex things simple, and who enjoys working hands-on in a fast-moving environment. You don’t need to have led large product organizations – what matters is that you’ve worked closely with engineers and designers and know how to bring an idea from concept to launch.
   

  

**We Believe You’ll Bring**
* Around 3+ years of experience in product management (or equivalent).
* Experience in building and improving digital products (web and/or app).
* Knowledge of product methodologies, user research and roadmapping.
* A strong sense of urgency and the ability to prioritize what really matters.
* A curious, commercial mindset and interest in what drives customer engagement.


 Fintech experience is a plus but not a must – we’ll help you get up to speed. What counts most is your drive to learn, execute and grow with us.
   

  

 In short we are looking for a pragmatic product generalist with a mix of business development and doer mentality. If you are still reading this we hope that sounds like a good fit? So let's get to the good stuff…
   

  

**We offer you**
 The chance to be part of something truly amazing. We aspire for a level of ambition that matches the scale of our mission. If you're ready to be a part of this transformation we want to hear from you. If you have high grit, an unwavering sense of urgency, and an unyielding commitment to excellence, we want you to be the driving force behind reshaping the financial world. This isn't just a job; it's a mission.
   

  

 We promise that you will be challenged, pushed to develop your skill set and get the opportunity to work alongside amazing and smart colleagues. At Anyfin, we hire great people and create the conditions for them to have real autonomy and impact, especially in product management. While we've had a good run so far it is what lies ahead that excites everyone that works here, and we are just getting started. Then there is the compensation package, centrally located cozy office, extra time off on your birthday and a bunch of other benefits as well. But we will get to all that in due time.
   

  

 For now begin your journey with us by clicking "Apply" below.
   

  

 We cannot wait to meet you!
   

  

*PS Please note that we are unable to provide visa sponsorship for this role.*
 Anyfin is a fintech on a mission to simplify loan repayments and improve the financial well-being of millions. We help consumers reduce the costs of high-interest loans, and take control of their repayment plan.

title: UX Lead
description:
Inera är ett digitaliseringsbolag som bidrar till att utveckla välfärden. Vi är Sveriges digitala ingång till hälsa, vård och omsorg och utvecklar digital infrastruktur för en sammanhållen välfärd. Vi arbetar på uppdrag av kommuner och regioner. Vår vision är världens mest innovativa och omtänksamma välfärd.
   

  

 För att kunna upprätthålla hög kvalitet inom hälsa, vård och omsorg måste välfärden utvecklas, med oförändrade eller minskade resurser. Genom digitalisering – att förändra strukturer, beteenden och arbetssätt med stöd av digital teknik – kan flera av välfärdens utmaningar mötas. Det gör Ineras uppdrag viktigare än någonsin.
   

  

**Om rollen** 
  

  

 Sektionen för tjänstearkitektur och design ansvarar för att utveckla kompetens, arbetssätt, riktlinjer och processer som möjliggör ett heltäckande tjänstearkitekturarbete. Vi ansvarar även för vårt UX-ramverk, som inkluderar designsystem, riktlinjer och metoder för hur vi skapar användarcentrerade lösningar för slutanvändare. Nu söker vi UX-designer som kan ta nästa steg i rollen som UX Lead.
   

  

 Som UX Lead har du en central roll i att driva och utveckla UX-arbetet. Du leder arbetet med att identifiera, analysera och konkretisera behov och krav, och omsätter dessa till konceptuella lösningar och användarflöden. Du arbetar i nära samarbete med UI-designers och utvecklingsteam, där du säkerställer att lösningar är användarvänliga, tillgängliga och tekniskt genomförbara.
   

  

**I Rollen Som UX Lead Kommer Du Att**
* planera, leda och följa upp UX-arbetet inom ett utvecklingsområde eller en produkt
* genomföra UX-research och analysera användarnas behov och beteenden
* omsätta insikter till lösningsförslag, koncept och användarflöden
* säkerställa att lösningsförslagen uppfyller tillgänglighetskrav och fungerar inom tekniska ramar
* bidra till att utveckla Ineras UX-erbjudande inom exempelvis datadriven design, UX-research, UX-copy och tillgänglighet


 Vi erbjuder en möjlighet att påverka och utveckla samhällsviktiga digitala tjänster inom offentlig sektor. Du får en central roll i ett engagerat team med starkt fokus på användarcentrerad design, där du har goda möjligheter att utveckla din kompetens inom ett brett spektrum av UX-områden. Rollen innebär också ett stort ansvar och mandat att driva UX-arbetet i betydelsefulla uppdrag och utvecklingsinitiativ.
   

  

**Är det här du?**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att arbeta med:
   

  

* UX-arbete, särskilt inom UX-research och behovsanalys
* tillgänglighet och inkluderande design, kännedom om WCAG (meriterande med certifiering)
* att omsätta behov till lösningar med hög användbarhet
* att leda UX-arbete i större uppdrag eller produktutvecklingsområden
* tekniska förutsättningar och begränsningar i utvecklingsmiljöer
* du har relevant utbildning och minst sex års erfarenhet från en liknande roll.


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Har**
* erfarenhet från hälso- och sjukvårdsområdet, särskilt arbete med medicintekniska produkter (MDR)
* specialistkompetens inom datadriven research och design, UX-copy eller tillgänglighet
* god förståelse för komplexa tekniska system


**Varaktighet och tillträde** 
  

  

 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid. Intervjuer kommer ske löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstidens slut.
   

  

**Frågor om rollen?** 
  

  

 Richard Frank, chef Tjänstearkitektur och design, richard.frank@inera.se
   

  

*Fackliga frågor (Vision), Monica Rosén,* 
 monica.rosen@inera.se
   

  

 Inera är ett digitaliseringsbolag som på uppdrag av kommuner och regioner bidrar till välfärdens utveckling. Vi är Sveriges digitala ingång till hälsa, vård och omsorg och utvecklar digital infrastruktur för en sammanhållen välfärd.

title: Principal Engineer, Electronics & Embedded Systems
description:
At Fiskars Group we are unified and driven by our common purpose: pioneering design to make the everyday extraordinary. Join our team and seize the extraordinary opportunity to influence the everyday!
   

  

**Fiskars Group**
**Principal Engineer, Electronics & Embedded Systems – R&D**
**OUR ROLE**
 We are looking for a seasoned
 **Principal Engineer, Electronics & Embedded Systems** 
 to join Fiskars R&D team. This is a senior-level technical expert role for someone with deep experience in electronics and embedded technologies, ideally in consumer electronics and battery-powered devices.
   

  

 Your mission? To dream big and make it real - develop advanced electronic architectures and embedded solutions that redefine functionality and elevate user experience. You will lead concept development and technical execution during the New Product Development (NPD) phase, ensuring robust, efficient, and innovative designs for battery-powered tools.
   

  

 You will work closely with cross-functional teams and suppliers, ensuring seamless integration of electronics into product architecture while maintaining quality, cost efficiency, and manufacturability. Your work will directly influence innovation and sustainability, introducing smart electronics, optimizing energy efficiency, and supporting Fiskars Group’s commitment to creating products that improve everyday life.
   

  

 This position is based in Espoo, Finland, and reports to our Senior Manager, R&D. The role is full-time and hybrid. Candidates based in the EU who are eligible to work in the EU are welcome to apply—relocation support to Finland will be provided where needed.
   

  

**What You’ll Do At Fiskars Group**
**Responsibilities:**
* Develop electronic systems and embedded solutions for battery-powered consumer products during the NPD phase.
* Drive concept creation and ensure technical feasibility for new designs.
* Perform advanced analysis and validation of electronic designs, ensuring reliability and compliance.
* Collaborate with mechanical engineers, industrial designers, product managers, and suppliers to integrate electronics seamlessly into product architecture.
* Stay ahead of emerging technologies in electronics, IoT, and embedded systems to fuel innovation.


**Who You Are**
**Experience:**
* MSc/BSc degree in Electronics Engineering, or related field.
* Minimum 8+ years of experience in electronics and embedded product development, preferably in consumer electronics or battery-powered devices.
* Expertise in circuit design, PCB layout, firmware development, and system integration.
* Familiarity with power management, and IoT technologies is a plus.
* Innovative mindset with a track record of delivering successful products.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills in English.


**START YOUR JOURNEY AT FISKARS GROUP**
 We are eagerly awaiting your application. We review applications on a continuous basis, so please submit your CV in English today!
   

  

 For further information please contact: Tao Huang, Senior Manager, R&D: email: tao.huang@fiskars.com.
   

  

 We are committed to protecting your personal data, so we only accept applications through our career website. Join us and be part of our journey to create value through strong brands, innovative products, and unique design.
   

  

 Apply now and make your mark with Fiskars Group!
   

  

**Last day of application:**
 2026-05-19
   

  

 At Fiskars, we value providing benefits that matter to you and cater to our diverse global workforce, no matter where you are in the world. While benefits may vary based on location, here are some of the incredible offerings you can expect when joining our team:
   

  

**Competitive Compensation:** 
 We ensure that our employees are fairly compensated based on industry standards and local market factors.
   

  

**Health and Wellness:** 
 Your well-being matters to us, no matter where you are. We offer various health and well-being focused programs and coverage, adapted to the requirements of each region.
   

  

**Work-Life Balance:** 
 We understand the need for balance in your life. Our paid time off plans and flexible work arrangements and policies are designed to accommodate local customs and personal commitments, enabling you to thrive in both your professional and personal life.
   

  

**Professional Development:** 
 We believe in nurturing talent and supporting professional growth. Through training programs, skill development initiatives and learning resources, we empower our employees to reach their full potential.
   

  

**Inclusive and Diverse Environment:** 
 We value diversity and promote inclusivity. Join a workplace where your unique background and perspectives are celebrated, fostering collaboration and respect across all our markets.
   

  

**Recognition and Rewards:** 
 We believe in celebrating and recognizing the contributions of our employees worldwide. Our recognition programs are designed to acknowledge exceptional performance and achievements, ensuring that your efforts are celebrated and valued.
   

  

**Vested Interest:** 
 Through our Employee Share Purchase Plan (ESPP), you have the opportunity to invest in Fiskars Group and become a proud co-owner, sharing in the success and growth of the company.
   

  

**Employee Discounts:** 
 We want to ensure our team members make each day the extraordinary with use of our products and offer product discounts across our brands.
   

  

*Please note that specific benefits may vary based on local regulations, market conditions, and other factors. We are committed to providing competitive and meaningful benefits to our employees in every market we operate.*
***Pioneering design to make the everyday extraordinary***
*Fiskars Group (FSKRS, Nasdaq Helsinki) is the global home of design-driven brands for indoor and outdoor living. Since 1649, we have designed products of timeless, purposeful, and functional beauty, while driving innovation and sustainable growth. In 2024, Fiskars Group’s global net sales were EUR 1.2 billion and we had close to 7,000 employees. We have two Business Areas (BA), Vita and Fiskars.*
*BA Vita offers premium and luxury products for the tableware, drinkware, jewelry and interior categories. Its well-known brands include Georg Jensen, Royal Copenhagen, Wedgwood, Moomin Arabia, Iittala and Waterford. In 2024, BA Vita’s reported net sales were EUR 605 million. Already 50% of BA Vita’s net sales comes from direct-to-consumer sales, comprising approximately 500 stores and approximately 60 e-commerce sites.*
*BA Fiskars consists of the gardening and outdoor categories, in addition to the scissors and creating, as well as cooking categories. The brands include Fiskars and Gerber. In 2024, BA Fiskars’ net sales were EUR 547 million.*
*Read more: fiskarsgroup.com*
 OBR1

title: Senior Mobile Application Engineer (React Native)
description:
**Description**
*Position at LeoVegas Group*
**About The Role**
 Join our team of skilled developers working on mobile applications for top LeoVegas brands like BetMGM, BetUK, and Expekt. With offices across Europe in Sweden, Poland, Spain, and the UK, we create high-performance and innovative solutions for both iOS and Android platforms.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Mobile Application Engineer, specializing in React Native, with a mobile-first mindset and an understanding of native development to help drive our projects forward.
   

  

 We are expanding our React Native team in Stockholm and are searching for talented engineers who are passionate about mobile development and eager to build innovative gaming experiences.
   

  

**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**
* Develop and maintain high-quality React native applications for both iOS and Android platforms
* Ensure a smooth, engaging, and intuitive user experience
* Work on apps for LeoVegas brands such as BetMGM, BetUK, and Expekt
* Improve and enhance applications with a strong product focus
* Contribute to launching new brands and expanding into new markets


**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
**Essential Skills**
* At least 5 years of experience working as a mobile developer for Android and iOS
* Strong experience with React Native
* Proficiency in TypeScript
* Good understanding of core JavaScript principles and concepts
* Experience with cloud integrations
* Experience with Rest API, Datadog, GraphQL, Firebase and version control


 NICE TO HAVES
   

  

* Experience writing Unit Tests
* Hands-on experience optimizing mobile performance
* Experience with CI/CD integrations


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 1400 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 11 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy (3 days a week in the office)
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


**JOIN US!**
 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: IT Pricipal-Enterprise Architect
description:
Key Responsibilities & Tasks
  
**Strategic Alignment:** Translate business strategy into actionable technology roadmaps and target architecture.
  
**Architecture Development & Governance:** Create, maintain, and enforce architectural principles, standards, and blueprints
  
**Technology Scouting & Standardization:** Evaluate, select, and govern technologies (cloud, integrations, AI/Data stacks) to ensure long-term value and reduce legacy debt.
  
**Stakeholder Management:** Collaborate with stakeholders across development, asset management, finance, and commercial functions.
  
**Digital Transformation:** Lead initiatives in cloud migration, integration-led transformations, and AI readiness.
  
**Mentorship:** Act as a mentor for Solution Architects and help mature the overall architecture function.
  
  

Required Skills & Qualifications
  
**Experience:** 15+ years of relevant experience in enterprise architecture, technology strategy, or IT transformation.
  
**Technical Expertise:** Deep knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure,AWS, Google), API-first strategies, integration patterns, and modern data stacks.
  
**Framework Knowledge:** Proficiency in frameworks such as TOGAF, ArchiMate, or SAFe.
  
**Soft Skills:** Strong communication skills (ability to explain complex technical ideas to non-technical stakeholders), leadership, and a collaborative mindset.
  
**Languages:** Fluency in English is essential, while proficiency in Swedish is frequently required or considered an advantage.
  
**Education:** Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or similar.
  
**AI and Data Governance:** High demand for architects who can design data platforms for AI/ML adoption.

title: Data Engineer
description:
**About Cerve**


At Cerve, our mission is to build the data foundation the €10 trillion food and beverage supply chain has been missing. We operate the supply chain intelligence infrastructure for F&B. With this foundation in place, the industry gains the visibility, automation and shared insight needed to expand margins, tackle waste, food security and food borne illness at scale.

**About the role**

As a Data Engineer at Cerve, you will play an essential role in designing, implementing, and improving the data products at the core of our platform.


In collaboration with Engineering and Product, you will help us build scalable, efficient, and effective data products. From the processing pipelines to the retrieval and agent systems built on top of them.

**What you’ll do:**


As our Data Engineer, you will be collaborating with the engineering and product teams. You will have a significant impact on our data infrastructure and products, designing and delivering cost-effective, performant and scalable solutions while maintaining high coding standards:

* **Data Ingestion & Transformation:** Design and maintain pipelines that turn messy real-world data into structure the business can build on.
* **Hands-on Architecture:** Own architectural decisions across Cloud Spanner, GCS, Cloud Run and our Go codebase, balancing cost, performance and scale.
* **Agent & LLM Infrastructure:** Build the retrieval systems and data layers that power our agent-facing features.
* **Cross-functional Collaboration:** Work with product and engineering to turn customer problems into shipped features, championing high-leverage, low-effort approaches.
* **Code Quality & Best Practices:** Write clean, tested code and raise the quality bar as the team grows.
* **Observability & Data Reliability:** Implement monitoring across pipelines and data systems to ensure reliability and quality.

**You are:**

* **Entrepreneurial**: Thriving in a fast-paced startup environment. You're proactive, self-motivated, and have a can-do attitude that gets projects done.
* **Systemic Thinker**: You can see the bigger picture while keeping an eye on the details, ensuring every element works in harmony.
* **Autonomous**: You are comfortable in small teams where you are expected to take full ownership of your projects, driving them from concept to completion.
* **Collaborative**: You’re eager to grow alongside us, learning from both success and setbacks as we build the platform together.
* **Thirst for Knowledge**: You’re passionate about your craft, always seeking new knowledge while sharing your best practices with the team.
* **Thriving in Ambiguity**: Uncertainty motivates you. You embrace complex challenges that often raise more questions than answers.

**You have:**

* 6+ years of hands-on data engineering in teams where data is the product, with real ownership of architecture decisions along the way
* Experience building data processing pipelines for user-facing products, such as RAG systems, agentic interfaces or data analytics products
* Strong database design skills across both operational stores (Postgres, Spanner) and analytics platforms (Databricks, BigQuery, or similar)
* Strong instincts around testing and code review.
* [+] Familiarity with back-end development in Go and cloud infrastructure on GCP

**We Offer:**

* **Salary**: Competitive
* **Discretionary Bonus**: Potential of company wide annual payment
* **Flexible Vacation**: 25 days, Bank holidays and Special days
* **Flexible hours**: Choose your working hours around core hours (9:30 – 16:30)
* **Stock Option**: Become an owner of Cerve with significant wealth creation potential
* **Pension**: Auto-enrolment into our pension scheme
* **Hybrid Workspace**: Hybrid working from our R&D Hub in Gothenburg
* **Best Tech and Equipment:** Macbook and the best equipment you need to excel
* **Relocation**: Potential relocation package for the right candidate in this role.

We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels welcome and valued. We believe that diversity of thought and experience is essential to our success, and we are particularly interested in candidates who can bring a different perspective to our team, regardless of their race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or career status.

title: Systemförvaltare till IT-Vårdtjänster
description:
**Vi är en kraft som binder ihop, håller samman och utvecklar länet. Inom Region Västernorrland är vi alla en del av något större.**

Verksamhet IT-Stöd inom Region Västernorrland har till uppgift att tillhandahålla en samlad tjänsteleverans av IT till våra kärnverksamheter, Regional utveckling och Hälso- och Sjukvården. Inom IT-stöd har enheten IT Vårdtjänster uppdraget att, tillsammans med kärnverksamheten, förvalta dom IT-komponenter unikt används av Hälso- & Sjukvården. Samtliga IT-komponenter som förvaltas har ett verksamhetskritiskt syfte och är grundläggande för den vård som bedrivs inom regionen. Vi söker nu en systemförvaltare som kommer arbeta som objektledare inom IT till vårt team.


En Objektledare IT inom Region Västernorrland arbetar i en verksamhetskritisk miljö där IT-stöd är helt avgörande för Hälso- och sjukvårdens dagliga funktion. Rollen befinner sig i skärningspunkten mellan teknik, vårdverksamhet och förvaltning, och bidrar direkt till en säker, stabil och effektiv vårdleverans i regionen.


Tjänsten avser en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Placeringsort är inom länet, Örnsköldsvik, Sollefteå, Härnösand eller Sundsvall.


**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

Som objektledare IT ansvarar du bland annat för att verkställa systemförvaltningsplanens tekniska delar på ett kostnadseffektivt sätt, att leveranserna är tillgängliga för verksamheten enligt överenskommen nivå, att externa leverantörer styrs med hjälp av kontrakt och att tekniska samband/integrationer fungerar tillfredsställande.


Du kommer att jobba tillsammans med objektledaren gentemot regionens kärnverksamhet och förvaltar systemen som ingår i objektet, hantera avvikelsehantering, kvalitetssäkra dokumentation, budgetering samt se till att aktiviteter i verksamhetsplanen blir uppfyllda. I uppdraget ingår också omvärldsbevakning för objektet.


Du ska vara en lyhörd och produktiv person som kan arbeta gentemot regionens verksamhet. Kunskap om kärnverksamhet med fokus på vård är fördelaktigt.


### **Vi söker dig som**

* Har högskole-, universitetsutbildning inom området IT eller på annat sätt tillgodogjord kunskap inom området som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig
* Har arbetslivserfarenhet av IT-arbete i större organisationer med komplexa miljöer
* Har arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete i en ledande roll, exempelvis projektledning, teamledare, förvaltningsledare eller produktägare
* Har arbetslivserfarenhet av att styra och följa upp leveranser ut ifrån avtalade leveransnivåer
* Har arbetat med att ta fram och följa upp budget och prognoser
* Har arbetat inom systemförvaltning av verksamhetskritiska system samt systematiskt förbättringsarbete
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt PM3, ITIL, PPS eller liknande strukturer
* Har arbetslivserfarenhet av verksamhetsnära IT arbete, gärna inom vård eller offentlig sektor
* Har goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift
* Har goda kunskaper i engelska i tal och skrift
* Har B-körkort

### **Det är meriterande om du**

* Har erfarenhet av att jobba inom en sourcad leveransmiljö
* Har utbildningar inom PM3, ITIL, projektledning, ledarskap eller agila arbetssätt

### **För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har dessa personliga egenskaper**

* Självgående
* Flexibel
* Helhetssyn
* Strukturerad

**Region Västernorrland**

**Med cirka 7000 medarbetare och över 200 yrken ansvarar vi på Region Västernorrland för flera av de verksamheter som är allra viktigast för invånarnas möjlighet att delta i samhället. Här gör din kunskap och ditt engagemang skillnad inom allt från hälso- och sjukvård till kultur, miljö och hållbarhet. Bli en del av ett lag där alla behövs. Tillsammans för ett växande Västernorrland.**


Regionen arbetar sedan många år med att skapa förutsättningar för att bidra till friska och hälsosamma medarbetare. Att du mår bra och trivs är viktigt för oss. En av våra många förmåner är att vi erbjuder 5000 kronor per år i friskvårdsbidrag. Läs mer om Region Västernorrland, våra förmåner och hur det är att jobba tillsammans med oss: Region Västernorrland - Att jobba i Region Västernorrland (rvn.se).


Inom Region Västernorrland är ett antal tjänster placerade i säkerhetsklass och säkerhetsprövning kan därför komma att ske. Vi har gjort vårt medieval för rekrytering och undanber oss därför kontakt med annonssäljare eller andra säljare av rekryteringstjänster.


Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!


**Anställning**
---------------


Tillsvidare
**Ansökan**
-----------

Välkommen med din ansökan **senast 2026-05-04**

**Upplysningar/fackliga kontaktpersoner**
