 Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!

title: Fiberprojektör inom digital infrastruktur, Huddinge kommun
description:
Vill du vara med och forma framtidens IT-leveranser i en samhällsviktig verksamhet? Nu söker vi en erfaren och driven fiberprojektör som vill ta ett helhetsgrepp om kommunens fibernätverk. Låter detta intressant? Då tycker vi att du ska läsa vidare!
   

  

**Om arbetet**
 Digitaliseringsavdelningen på Huddinge kommun står inför en spännande resa under de kommande åren då kommunen satsar på att bli en av Sveriges främsta digitaliseringskommuner. Avdelningen består av sektionerna Arkitektur och Innovation, Samordnad verksamhetsutveckling, Digital drift samt Digitalt stöd. Vi är cirka 80 medarbetare och leds av framtidsdirektören som rapporterar till kommundirektören och ingår i Huddinge kommuns ledningsgrupp.
   

  

 Vårt uppdrag är att leverera IT- och digitaliseringstjänster som är anpassade till verksamheternas mål och behov, och samtidigt proaktivt leda verksamheterna igenom den digitala transformationen.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Huddinge kommun är idag både ledningsägare och operatör av ett omfattande kommunalt fibernät som sträcker sig över hela kommunen. Detta gör oss till en av de största aktörerna på marknaden, även i jämförelse med privata aktörer.
   

  

 För fortsatt expansion och för förvaltning av befintligt nät söker vi nu dig som vill vara med att utveckla, bygga och förvalta Huddinge kommuns fibernät.
   

  

 Det dagliga arbetet leds och styrs av Förvaltningsansvarig för fibernätet. Du rapporterar till chefen för sektionen Digital drift och blir en del av ett engagerat team som tillsammans driver kommunens digitalisering framåt.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
 Som fiberprojektör har du ett brett och varierat ansvar, där du både driver projekt och bidrar till långsiktig utveckling:
   

  

* Projektering av fibernätsarbeten, inklusive schakt och anläggning
* Projektledning och samordning gentemot entreprenörer
* Hantering av mark- och tillståndsfrågor
* Kvalitetssäkring av projekt och fibernät
* Drift, underhåll och förvaltning av befintligt nät
* Förbindelseproduktion
* Hantering av ärenden i Ledningskollen
* Dokumentation av nät, noder och anslutningar, inklusive utskarvningsplaner


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har flerårig erfarenhet av fiberprojektering. Du arbetar idag som fiberprojektör eller inom telekom eller anläggning, alternativt har du en bakgrund som fibertekniker som du har vidareutvecklat.
   

  

 Du är självgående, lösningsorienterad och har ett starkt eget driv. Samtidigt är du kommunikativ och har lätt för att samarbeta med både kollegor och externa aktörer. Du tar initiativ, driver arbetet framåt och bidrar gärna till förbättring och utveckling. Rollen kräver därför att du har god förmåga att uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska.
   

  

 Eftersom rollen innebär både kontorsarbete och arbete ute i fält behöver du ha B-körkort.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet från en liknande roll inom kommun, offentlig sektor eller större organisation
* Flerårig erfarenhet av projektering inom fibernät
* Erfarenhet av markfrågor och tillståndsprocesser
* God vana av ledningssamordning och koordinering
* B-körkort
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska i tal och skrift
* Erfarenhet från kommun, offentlig sektor eller större organisation, ses som meriterande
* Kunskaper i AutoCAD och/eller MicroStation, ses som meriterande


**Varför Huddinge?**
 För att vi ska kunna utföra vårt uppdrag är du som medarbetare i Huddinge kommun det viktigaste vi har. Därför erbjuder vi en rad förmåner för ett hållbart arbetsliv och för att underlätta din vardag.
   

  

 https://www.huddinge.se/arbete-och-karriar/arbeta-i-huddinge-kommun/#Formaner
   

  

 Om arbetsplatsen
   

  

 Värderar du närhet, att växa och skapa de bästa förutsättningarna för alla som bor och verkar i Huddinge kommun? Då erbjuder vi mängder av karriärmöjligheter i en välfungerande och växande kommun med både natur och storstadspuls runt hörnet. Hos oss känner du dig trygg, delaktig och stolt när vi med kraft gör skillnad, varje dag. I Huddinge kommun arbetar vi för att skapa ett hållbart samhälle, där natur, teknik och god service samspelar. Huddinge är en stor Stockholmskommun med cirka 6 400 medarbetare och fler än 110 000 invånare.
   

  

 Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen.
   

  

 Huddinge kommun arbetar för att vara en trygg, rättssäker och professionell verksamhet. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kan vi därför komma att genomföra bakgrundskontroller och begära registerutdrag i slutskedet av vissa rekryteringar. Om du blir aktuell för detta får du tydlig information och möjlighet att lämna ditt samtycke innan kontrollen genomförs.
   

  

 Facklig kontaktperson
   

  

 För facklig kontaktperson för tjänsten se Facklig kontaktinformation
   

  

 Anställningens omfattning
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidareanställning
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

**Ansök senast:** 
 2026-05-06
   

  

**Referensnummer:** 
 C318606
   

  

 Anställning
   

  

**Antal annonserade arbetstillfällen:** 
 1
   

  

 Vi undanber oss alla erbjudanden om annonsering och rekryteringshjälp i samband med denna annons.

title: Systemtekniker med fokus på Active Directory
description:
Är du intresserad av att förvalta och utveckla användarnära och verksamhetskritiska it‑tjänster, med särskilt ansvar för Active Directory? Sök det här jobbet på Finansinspektionen (FI)!
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Som systemtekniker på avdelningen Applikationsdrift och it-support är du en del av det team som förvaltar användarnära tjänster inom FI. Teamet har ett tydligt fokus på säkerhet, tillgänglighet och användarvänlighet eftersom flera av tjänsterna är kritiska för FI:s verksamhet. Teamet ansvarar bland annat för servrar, klienter (Windows), telefoni, e‑post, mötesrumsteknik och azuretjänster.
   

  

 Ditt primära fokus och ansvar ligger inom Active Directory och kringtjänster men du bidrar även med din kompetens och fungerar som resurs inom teamets övriga förvaltningsobjekt. I rollen har du förvaltningsansvar.
   

  

 Arbetet innefattar uppgradering, felsökning och konfiguration av system samt stöd till verksamheten och andra it‑team. Du ansvarar även för systemövervakning och bedriver relevant omvärldsbevakning. För att säkerställa ett effektivt och kvalitetssäkrat arbetssätt förväntas du aktivt bidra till förbättring och vidareutveckling av de processer och rutiner som styr arbetet.
   

  

**Din utbildning och erfarenhet**
 Vi söker dig som
   

  

* har relevant eftergymnasial utbildning eller certifiering, eller kan på annat vis styrka dina kunskaper
* har erfarenhet av förvaltning av Active Directory och kringtjänster
* har kunskap om Automatisering och scripthantering
* har flera års erfarenhet inom it-drift där du jobbat som systemtekniker
* uttrycker dig väl på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.


 Det är meriterande om du
   

  

* har tidigare erfarenhet av arbete på myndighet
* har kunskap om Microsoft Sharepoint
* van att hantera applikationer och klienter
* har kunskap om Microsoft Exchange On-prem
* har erfarenhet av Microsofts molnlösningar
* tidigare har haft förvaltningsansvar för AD.


**Om dig**
 I det här jobbet behöver du
   

  

* planera, organisera och prioritera ditt arbete på ett effektivt sätt
* driva ditt arbete framåt och ta beslut inom ditt ansvarsområde
* kommunicera tydligt med olika målgrupper
* ta egna initiativ.


**Om oss**
 Finansinspektionen (FI) bidrar till ett stabilt finansiellt system, välfungerande marknader, en hållbar utveckling och ett högt skydd för konsumenter. Vi erbjuder dig att arbeta med samhällsviktiga uppgifter, där du är med och påverkar den finansiella marknaden. På FI arbetar cirka 600 personer och våra värderingar präglas av att vi är engagerade, beslutsamma, målinriktade och hjälpsamma. Vår arbetsplats ligger centralt i Stockholm. Det finns även möjlighet att delvis arbeta på distans. För mer information om vår organisation: https://www.fi.se/sv/om-fi/organisation/
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 Vi baserar vår rekrytering på kompetens. Det innebär att vi noggrant definierar vilka kvalifikationer som efterfrågas och sedan utgår från dem genom hela rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

 Vi arbetar aktivt för mångfald och likabehandling och välkomnar därför medarbetare med olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och kompetenser.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 På FI arbetar vi aktivt för att vara en attraktiv arbetsgivare där du som medarbetare trivs och utvecklas. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba på FI och vad vi erbjuder: https://www.fi.se/sv/om-fi/arbeta-pa-fi/vi-erbjuder/https://www.fi.se/sv/om-fi/lediga-jobb/vi-erbjuder/
   

  

 En anställning på FI kan innebära att säkerhetsprövning och registerkontroll görs enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen.
   

  

**Sök jobbet**
 Välkommen med din ansökan som ska innehålla cv och relevanta intyg eller examensbevis.
   

  

 Vi avböjer all hjälp med rekrytering och annonsering.
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
   

  

**Kontaktperson:** 
 Joakim Sandberg, Avdelningschef, 08-408 980 93
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-05-04

title: ITAD Sales Specialist
description:
****Join Foxway and drive the future of circular tech!****
 At Foxway, we’re transforming how organizations manage their IT devices — unlocking more value, extending lifecycles, and driving real impact through circular technology. A key part of this is
 **IT Asset Disposition (ITAD)** 
 making sure used IT equipment is securely handled, refurbished, resold, or recycled to maximize value and minimize waste.
   

  

 Now, we’re looking for an
 **ITAD Sales Specialist** 
 ready to accelerate our growth in Sweden and make a mark in a high-potential, fast-moving space.
   

  

****About the role:****
 This is a hybrid sales role where you’ll both
 **build new business and grow existing customers** 
 . You will:
   

  

* Act as the main commercial contact for Swedish ITAD customers.
* Drive new sales of ITAD services in Sweden.
* Prospect and reach out to new customers (cold calling, outbound).
* Identify and convert opportunities within existing DaaS/LCM customers.
* Own the full sales cycle from first contact to signed deal.
* Manage and grow your own customer portfolio.
* Act as the main commercial contact for ITAD customers.
* Support customers throughout the ITAD lifecycle (reports, follow-ups, settlements).
* Collaborate closely with operations, logistics, finance, and service teams.
* Contribute to improving processes, ways of working, and sales materials.


****Who we are looking for** 
 :** 
 You’re a
 **hands-on salesperson** 
 who enjoys both hunting and building relationships. We believe you:
   

  

* Have 2+ years of experience in B2B sales.
* Are comfortable with cold calling and outbound prospecting.
* Know how to build pipeline and close deals.
* Take ownership of your customers and follow through.
* Are structured, proactive, and driven by results.
* Balance high activity with high quality.
* Are fluent in English. Swedish is a strong plus, not a strict requirement for the right candidate.
* Are located and capable to work either in Växjö, Gothenburg or Stockholm.


**Bonus if you:**
* Have experience in IT, tech, or lifecycle services.
* Understand logistics or circular business models.


****Why join Foxway?****
* High ownership and real impact on business growth.
* Collaborative and entrepreneurial environment.
* Opportunity to grow within sales and business development.
* Competitive salary with sales bonus, pension, collective agreement, full-time benefits.


****Are you our next colleague?****
 If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we’d love to hear from you — send in your application today!

title: Customer Service Data & Digital Transformation Manager
description:
Sales
   

  

 Permanent
   

  

**Job Description**
**Where Data, Customers, and Growth Come Together**
*At Electrolux Group, a leading global appliance company, we strive every day to shape living for the better for our consumers, our people and our planet. We share ideas and collaborate so that together, we can develop solutions that deliver enjoyable and sustainable living.*
*Come, join us as you are. We believe diverse perspectives make us stronger and more innovative. In our global community of people from 100+ countries, we listen to each other, actively contribute and grow together.*
*Join us in our exciting quest to build the future home!*
**Customer Service Data & Digital Transformation Manager.**
**About the role:**
 You will join the EMEA Customer Service team within Sales Operations EMEA, supporting over 30 markets across the region. Our mission is to accelerate Electrolux’s growth through a customer‑centric, data‑driven approach, delivering world‑class service while enabling sales growth and cost efficiency.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 You will lead our data and digital transformation initiatives—turning customer and operational insights into action, automating key touchpoints across the customer journey, and fostering a data‑driven, digital mindset across all markets.
   

  

 You’ll work closely within the established key user network and with colleagues across the various functions, proactively identifying opportunities to enhance efficiency, adapt to evolving conditions, and continuously improving the experience we deliver to our Customers and Consumers.
   

  

**In detail, you will:**
* Lead data‑driven transformation initiatives Drive the development and delivery of data and digital initiatives within Customer Service, ensuring they support business priorities and create measurable value across markets.
* Turn customer and operational data into actionable insight Analyse and interpret data from multiple sources to identify trends, pain points, and opportunities that enhance customer experience and operational performance.
* Automate and optimise customer journey touchpoints
* Implement, and maintain automation solutions to streamline key stages of the customer journey, reducing manual workload and improving service quality.
* Champion a data‑driven culture across markets Promote best practices, build capability, and support teams in embedding data-led decision making and digital tools into their everyday activities.
* Drive continuous improvement in Customer Service processes Identify efficiency opportunities across workflows, systems, and channels, recommending and implementing solutions that boost productivity and customer satisfaction.
* Collaborate cross-functionally to deliver digital initiatives Work closely with IT, DXO, Supply Chain, and other stakeholders to align on priorities, share insights, and ensure successful implementation of digital solutions.
* Support adoption of new tools and technology Facilitate change management by providing training, documentation, and key user support to ensure high adoption and effective use of new digital capabilities.


**Requirements:**
* 5+ years’ experience in Customer Service, Digital Transformation or Business Process Improvement
* Strong order-to-cash process knowledge and experience with SAP
* Proven experience leading data-driven digital transformation initiatives
* Previous leadership experience, leading teams or projects is a plus
* Proficient in Excel& Office 365 and working knowledge of Power BI
* Keen interest in data governance, analytics, automation or AI


**Competences:**
* Analytics: You can interpret complex data and are able to translate them into meaningful, useful insights that steer effective decision-making. You are digitally savvy and can work seamlessly with new tools and technology.
* Collaboration: You ask and you listen, you take ideas on board and work with leaders and key users taking everyone in the same direction. You build relationships and can engage internal stakeholders to achieve common goals
* Effective Communication: You set clear objectives and direction for others. You clarify priorities and can interact with different functions and levels within the company. You are structured, organised and agile in a fast-changing environment.
* Change management and adoption: You challenge the status quo, continuously seek better solutions and aim for automation. You are open-minded and drive change.
* Strategic Capability: You translate the business needs into priorities to drive high impact results and deploy them with speed.


**Where you’ll be** 
**:**
 You will ideally be based at our HQ in Stockholm, Sweden, or a primary market location in Europe. It will be necessary to be available for international traveling one to four times a year.
   

  

**Some of our benefits include** 
 :
   

  

* Flexible work hours and partial hybrid work environment
* Discounts on award-winning Electrolux products and services
* Family-friendly benefits
* Comprehensive insurance policy
* Extensive learning opportunities and flexible career paths


 As part of Electrolux Group, we will continuously invest in you and your development. There are no barriers to where your career could take you.

title: Undergraduate scholarship in vaccine research
description:
**Do you want to contribute to top quality medical research?**




 One position is now open in Professor Karin Loré’s group to study mechanisms of action of vaccines. The overall focus of the research group is to investigate immune functions by which different vaccine formulations regulate immunity. The successful candidate will join an enthusiastic team at the Department of Medicine, Solna at Karolinska Institutet and study timely questions in close collaboration with the vaccine industry.
   

  





****Duties****




 The group's studies focus on the generation of high quality and durable B cell and T cell responses by vaccination. This includes assessments of the early innate immune profile locally and systemically after vaccination as well as the development of antigen-specific responses. The group focuses on high resolution analyses of both early cell activation and gene modulation as well as of the B cell and antibody response such as single cell isolation, sequencing and mapping of antibody specificities. The project will have a special focus on novel malaria vaccines and primarily employ pre-clinical samples from a non-human primate model, covering several standard immunological and molecular techniques.
   

  





 The position will be based at Karolinska Institutet, Stockholm, Sweden. We work in collaboration with academic partners, vaccine companies as well as funding agencies such as the Bill and Melinda Gates foundation. Thus, the candidate will have the opportunity to interact with and learn various scientific and technical expertise from leading researchers in the vaccine field.
   

  





 The candidate is expected to learn and take part in experimental design and experimentation, data interpretation as well as to join research-related activities such as group meetings and to take part in routine work within our research group.
   

  





****Entry requirements****




 We are seeking a highly motivated researcher with a strong desire to study principles of immune system functions after vaccination and infection. The candidate applying must have a Bachelor's degree in immunology, microbiology, biomedicine or a related discipline. Some knowledge of vaccine immunology and experience with some of the relevant experimental approaches (e.g. clinical and preclinical animal study sample processing, ELISA, PCRs) is required. Some first experience in malaria vaccine research and bioinformatics analyses in the context of B cell receptor sequencing is considered an advantage. Emphasis will be placed on personal suitability and compatibility with lab members. Applicants must have good communication skills in English and ability to collaborate and work productively in a team.
   

  





****Qualification****




 The scholarships may be granted only to:
 


* Persons who have been admitted (and registered in Ladok) to KI to study at the undergraduate or graduate level,
* Persons who are admitted (and registered) to undergraduate or graduate level programs at a university with which KI collaborates.



 The scholarships can be granted either for studies in an existing course or for a shorter period of practical research experience (documented in an individual study plan/research plan) for admitted students at the undergraduate or graduate level. The scholarships may be awarded for up to 12 months (divided into a maximum of four courses/periods) during the study period. Decisions on scholarships may be made for a maximum of six months at a time.
   

  





 The scholarships may not be disbursed to any person who received a salary or remuneration from KI during the two-year period immediately preceding the potential disbursement. This provision may be waived if the income received during the preceding two-year period relates to:
 


* Income of less than 1,000 SEK per year
* Compensation paid to research subjects
* Compensation paid to student representatives on KI boards/committees
* Compensation for work performed that was of an entirely different nature than education and research



****What do we offer?****




 A creative and inspiring environment with wide-ranging expertise and interests. Karolinska Institutet is one of the world's leading medical universities. Here, we conduct innovative medical research and provide the largest range of biomedical education in Sweden. At KI, you get to meet researchers working with a wide range of specialisms and methods, giving you ample opportunity to exchange knowledge and experience with the various scientific fields within medicine and health. It is the crossover collaborations, which have pushed KI to where it is today, at the forefront of global research. Several of the people you meet in healthcare are educated at KI. A close relationship with the health care providers is important for creating groundbreaking top quality education and research. Students and employees have free access to our modern gym facilities with trained staff on site.
   

  





****Location****




 The position is located within the Department of Medicine, Solna. The department consists of ten divisions and each division consists of several research groups. The position is located within the research group of Karin Loré at the Division of Immunology and Respiratory Medicine. A range of preclinical as well as clinical studies in allergy, infections and immune modulation are being conducted within the division. The successful candidate will join an international team. Stockholm is a vibrant international megapolis with high quality of living standard. English is the working language of the group. The Karolinska Institutet is one of the centers of excellence for biomedical research in the world (ranked as 8th in the world in Life Sciences and Medicine by QS World University Ranking). It possesses cutting edge infrastructure.
   

  





 https://ki.se/en/meds/research-group-karin-lore.
   

  





****Application process****




*An* 
*application* 
*must* 
*contain* 
*the* 
*following* 
*documents* 
*in* 
*English* 
*or* 
*Swedish:* 



* *A complete curriculum vitae, including date of the thesis defence, title of the thesis, previous academic positions, academic title, current position, academic distinctions, and committee work*
* *A complete list of publications*
* *A summary of current work (no more than one page)*



  
   

  





 The application is to be submitted on the Varbi recruitment system.
   

  





**Want to make a difference? Join us and contribute to better health for all**

title: VP Head of Ericsson Research
description:
**The Opportunity**
 As the Head of Ericsson Research, you will serve as the thought leader and driver for our long-term technological vision.
   

  

 Reporting directly to the Group CTO, you will lead a world-renowned global organization dedicated to exploring and developing new break-through connectivity and AI technology.
   

  

 This is a role for a visionary leader who can bridge the gap between breakthrough scientific exploration and global industrial leadership, ensuring Ericsson remains at the absolute forefront of technology.
   

  

**The Mandate**
* Strategic Stewardship: Direct a global workforce of over 800 professionals across 14 countries, fostering a culture of excellence, intellectual curiosity, and high-performance delivery.
* Innovation Ecosystems: Work in close cooperation with all Business Areas, Development Units, Market Areas and key Customer Units, as well as partners, leading customers, top-tier universities and research institutes.
* Technological Leadership: Secure Ericsson’s leadership in the global market by balancing long-term exploration with tangible technology transfers that fuel our product and service roadmaps.
* Global Advocacy: Represent Ericsson within the scientific community and at major international fora, shaping the global discourse on future technologies.


**Executive Profile & Competencies**
**Visionary & Strategic Agility**
* A proven ability to translate macro-industry trends and customer insights into a robust research agenda.
* Deep mastery of the interplay between innovation complexity and evolving business models.


**Technical & Domain Mastery**
* Extensive expertise across the full stack: Radio, AI, Network Architecture, Security, and Hardware/Software co-design.
* A specific focus on distributed, realtime AI, including AI-native networks, compute paradigms, and the integration of AI into the very fabric of research methodology.


**Operational Excellence**
* Significant experience leading large-scale, global R&D organizations with a track record of successfully managing "leaders of leaders."
* A sophisticated understanding of standardization strategies and open source dynamics as levers for market influence.


**Ecosystem & Influence**
* An established global network spanning academia (top-tier professors/universities) and industry (C-suite technology executives).
* Exceptional communication skills, with the presence and gravitas to distil complex technical concepts for diverse, global stakeholders.


**Requirements**
* Academic Background: PhD or MSc in a relevant field; a distinguished career in senior line management within a global context.
* Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Global HQ).
* Reporting Line: Member of the Group Function Technology Leadership Team, reporting to the CTO and Head of Group Function Technology.


**Contact** 
 - Please direct all questions to Martin Eriksson, Executive Recruiter - martin.b.eriksson@ericsson.com
   

  

**Why join Ericsson?** 
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?** 
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.
   

  

 Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.
   

  

**Primary country and city:** 
 Sweden (SE) || Stockholm
   

  

**Req ID:** 
 783964

title: Master Data Solution Architect & MM SME
description:
Vi söker en erfaren Master Data Solution Architect & MM SME för ett omfattande transformationsprogram där en global SAP S/4HANA-lösning implementeras. Uppdraget syftar till att harmonisera processer, stärka datastyrning och säkerställa en hållbar ERP-struktur. Masterdata är en central komponent för stabil drift, konsekvent rapportering och effektiva tvärfunktionella processer.
   

  

 Rollen kombinerar lösningsarkitektur, datamigrering samt operativt stöd till verksamheten och innebär ett nära samarbete mellan IT och affär.
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning / arbetsuppgifter**
**Som Konsult Kommer Du Att**
* Äga och vidareutveckla den globala materialmaster-strukturen inklusive kopplingar till klassificering och variantkonfiguration (VC)
* Leda implementation av masterdata-koncept och säkerställa beroenden och processpåverkan
* Definiera scenariobaserade regler, mallar och designstandarder
* Säkerställa ett end-to-end-perspektiv för masterdataflöden och integrationer (t.ex. MES, planeringssystem, MDMG)
* Modellera och vidareutveckla centrala masterdataprocesser
* Definiera scenarier för olika materialtyper (t.ex. reservdelar, kemikalier, produkter)


**Inom Data & Migration**
* Stötta design av material-, service- och klassificeringsstrukturer
* Mappa och transformera legacydata till SAP S/4HANA
* Stötta utveckling av variantkonfigurationsmodeller
* Samordna och delta i E2E-testning
* Genomföra utbildningar (train-the-trainer och slutanvändare)
* Bidra till behörighetskoncept och informationsstyrning


**Operativt Stöd**
* Felsöka och förbättra masterdataprocesser
* Hantera massuppdateringar och datakorrigeringar
* Säkerställa stabilitet efter go-live
* Stötta produktintroduktionsprocesser (NPI)
* Bidra till införande av datastyrningsprinciper


**Skallkrav**
* Djup kompetens inom SAP MM inklusive:
+ Material master
+ Klassificering
+ Variantkonfiguration (VC/AVC)

* Erfarenhet av SAP S/4HANA-implementationer (design, migrering, test, cutover)
* Stark förståelse för masterdata och dess tvärfunktionella användning
* Erfarenhet av datamodellering och informationsarkitektur
* Erfarenhet av integrationslösningar mot produktions- och planeringssystem
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i större transformationsprogram
* Mycket goda kunskaper i engelska


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av SAP Signavio och SAP Best Practices
* Erfarenhet av SAP AVC backend-modellering
* Erfarenhet av datastyrning (data governance) i större organisationer
* Kunskap om produktionsnära system (t.ex. MES, planeringsverktyg)
* Kunskaper i svenska


**Personliga egenskaper**
* Självgående och proaktiv
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga med förmåga att översätta affärsbehov till tekniska lösningar
* Analytisk och strukturerad med hög noggrannhet
* God samarbetsförmåga i komplexa och tvärfunktionella miljöer


**Start, slut, omfattning och plats**
* Start: omgående
* Slut:dec 2026 – goda möjligheter till förlängning
* Omfattning: 100%
* Plats: Solna (hybrid, med resor inom Sverige, Finland och USA)

title: Head of Accounting Europe
description:
**Join Emaldo as our new Head of Accounting Europe** 








 📍 Location: Stockholm (Sweden), or Ølstykke
 
 (
 
 Denmark
 
 )
 




 📅 Experience: 7+ years
 



 🧾 Focus areas: Leadership, Accounting & Controlling of all European based entities
 



 👤 Reporting to: Patrik Hjorth Danielsen, CFO
 







 Are you a strong accounting leader with a passion for structure, accuracy, and building scalable finance operations?
 







 Do you have solid hands-on accounting experience combined with the ability to lead, improve processes, and ensure high-quality financial reporting across multiple entities?
 







 Then you might be the Head of Accounting we’re looking for at Emaldo!
 







**About the Role** 




 As our Head of Accounting Europe, you will take full ownership of accounting operations across our current and future European entities.
 







 You will be responsible for ensuring high-quality financial reporting, compliance, and efficient processes across all entities, while also leading and developing our accounting function.
 







 This is a key leadership role where you will combine hands-on execution with strategic oversight - driving improvements, strengthening controls, and supporting the company’s continued growth.
 







 You will report directly to our CFO, Patrik Hjorth Danielsen, and work closely with stakeholders across the business.
 







 This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys taking ownership and being part of a dynamic, international environment where things are evolving fast.
 







**What You’ll Do** 




 Your key responsibilities will include:
 


* Owning the full accounting function across European entities.
* Leading and developing accounting processes, controls, and systems.
* Ensuring accurate and timely monthly, quarterly, and annual closings.
* Managing year-end closing, annual financial statements, and audits.
* Overseeing payroll, reconciliations, and statutory reporting.
* Ensuring compliance with local GAAP and tax regulations.
* Preparing and reviewing management reports and supporting group consolidation.
* Supporting budgeting and forecasting processes.
* Driving process improvements and automation across finance operations.







**What We’re Looking For** 



* Relevant education in accounting, finance, or similar.
* Strong knowledge of accounting standards (IFRS and local gap).
* 7+ years of experience in accounting or finance roles.
* Proven experience in a senior or lead accounting position.
* Experience managing or mentoring team members is a plus.
* Experience with ERP systems, Business Central is a plus (we will do a transition during 2H 2026).
* Strong Excel and IT skills.
* Fluent in English.
* Structured, detail-oriented, and quality-driven.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to see the bigger picture.
* Comfortable working both hands-on and at a strategic level.







**Why Join Emaldo:** 




 At
 **Emaldo** 
 , you’ll join a purpose-driven, international team that’s shaping the future of home energy solutions. We offer:
 


* A chance to make real impact in the green energy transition.
* A growing, global company with career opportunities.
* Learning from experienced finance professionals while developing your own expertise.
* Flexible working hours and hybrid options.
* A collaborative, inclusive, and dynamic environment with flat organizational structure.
* Competitive salary based on qualifications and experience.



  









**About Emaldo:** 




 At
 **Emaldo** 
 , our mission is to deliver innovative, sustainable energy solutions for modern homes.
 



 We specialize in smart energy systems with battery storage - empowering homeowners to use clean energy efficiently, reduce CO₂ emissions, and enjoy reliable power without compromise.
 



 Being part of Emaldo means joining a passionate, forward-thinking team working together to make a meaningful difference in the world.
 







**A Message from Your Future Manager** 




 My name is Patrik, and I represent Emaldo.
 







 As a leader, I place strong emphasis on value-add, structure, clarity and transparent communication. I am committed to fostering a professional and trusting environment where individuals feel respected, supported and empowered to develop every day.
 







 In my role, I act as a strategic partner to the business, translating financial insight into actionable decisions that support our continued growth. As we embark on an ambitious green growth journey, I am looking for a colleague who can complement this approach and help ensure that we consistently deliver high-quality financial support to the organization.
 







 Within our finance team, we focus on building robust processes, sharing knowledge and maintaining operational excellence. At the same time, we value a positive and engaging work environment, where dedication and high performance go hand in hand with a strong team spirit and enjoyment in our work.
 







 If you are motivated by collaboration, accountability and contributing to a purpose-driven organization, you will find a strong fit with us at Emaldo.
 







 I look forward to welcoming you to our growing team.
 







 Ready to Make a Difference?
 



 Send your CV via the “Apply” button – focus on your experience in accounting, reporting and financial processes.
 







 📞 Questions?
 



 Contact Patrik Hjorth Danielsen, CFO, at pd@emaldo.com
 



 We believe in equal opportunities – whether you’re returning to the job market, changing industries, or simply looking for new challenges, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Application Manager
description:
**Dynamics 365 Application Manager ERP, AI & Automation** 




 Är du intresserad av att arbeta med ett av Sveriges starkaste varumärken?
 



 Trivs du i en organisation som värdesätter teamwork och samarbete?
 



  





 År 1976 skapades ett arv som fortfarande är en viktig del av vår historia, vår nutid och vår framtid. I dag finns Polarn O. Pyret på flera marknader genom e‑handel, butiker och partners. Nu står vi inför en ny fas av tillväxt där AI och moderna affärssystem är centrala möjliggörare.
 



  





 Vill du vara med och forma nästa generations ERP‑landskap i ett bolag med starkt varumärke och höga ambitioner? Välkommen till Polarn O. Pyret och vårt Digital Office!
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Vi söker en Dynamics 365 Application Manager med starkt teknik och AI‑intresse, som vill arbeta med och vidareutveckla vårt ERP‑landskap inom Dynamics 365.
 



  





 Rollen är bred och strategiskt viktig. Du arbetar med våra centrala affärsprocesser inom Commerce, Supply Chain och Finance, samtidigt som du är med och driver hur vi nyttjar AI, automation, Power Platform och agentbaserade arbetssätt framåt.
 



  





 Du blir en del av Digital Office vårt interna IT‑ och utvecklingsteam som ansvarar för helheten i vårt systemlandskap och driver utvecklingen av framtidens digitala arbetssätt.
 



  





 Här kombinerar du hands‑on systemarbete med arkitektur, förbättringsinitiativ och innovation i nära samarbete med affären. Detta är en roll för dig som ser Dynamics 365 som en plattform och vill vara med och utnyttja dess fulla potential.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Driva affärsprocesser och systemstöd i vardagen
 


* Förvalta och vidareutveckla affärsprocesser med stöd av Dynamics 365 inom Commerce, Supply Chain och Finance
* Konfigurera, testa och optimera funktionalitet i system och flöden
* Arbeta nära verksamheten för att förstå behov och omsätta dem till smarta, hållbara lösningar
* Säkerställa hög datakvalitet, stabila flöden och ett sammanhållet systemlandskap



 Systemförvaltning, kvalitet och kontinuerlig utveckling
 


* Arbeta enligt Evergreen‑metodik med löpande uppdateringar och förbättringar
* Driva releaseplanering, tester och kommunikation kring ny funktionalitet
* Felsöka incidenter och analysera rotorsaker i komplexa processer och beroenden
* Dokumentera processer, datamodeller och systemarkitektur



 Samspel mellan plattformar, integrationer och team
 


* Arbeta i ett integrerat Microsoft ekosystem där affärssystem samverkar med kringliggande lösningar
* Delta i diskussioner kring arkitektur, integrationer, API‑flöden och data
* Samarbeta tätt med andra Application Managers, stakeholders och kravställare



  





 AI, automation & nästa generations ERP‑arbetssätt
 



 Hos Polarn O. Pyret ser vi Dynamics 365 som ett modernt, agent‑enabled ERP, där Microsofts plattform ger stora möjligheter att kombinera affärslogik, automation och AI.
 



 I den här rollen förväntas du:
 


* Utforska och använda Copilot, Power Automate, Power Apps, AI Builder och Copilot Studio
* Identifiera affärsprocesser som kan automatiseras, förenklas eller förbättras med hjälp av AI och automation
* Vara med och utveckla lösningar där naturligt språk, agenter och intelligenta flöden blir en del av vardagen
* Förlänga ERP‑funktionaliteten genom Power Apps och agent‑lösningar
* Bidra till ett arbetssätt där strukturerade affärsprocesser möter agentiska möjligheter och intelligent automation



 Vi tror på kraften i Microsoft Cloud:
 



 Dynamics 365 + Power Platform + Azure + Microsoft 365 som en sammanhållen plattform.
 



 Det här är en roll för dig som vill arbeta med next‑level ERP, där AI och teknik är affärskritiska verktyg,inte framtidsord.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som har** 




 Erfarenhet och kompetens
 


* Stark erfarenhet av Dynamics 365 inom ERP (Commerce, Supply Chain, Finance eller liknande)
* God förståelse för affärsprocesser och systemflöden
* Vana att arbeta med masterdata, datamodeller och systemförvaltning
* Erfarenhet av integrationer och felsökning i komplexa miljöer



 Tech‑ och AI‑intresse
 


* Stark nyfikenhet på teknik, AI och automation
* Intresse för – eller erfarenhet av – Power Platform, Copilot‑lösningar och lågkod/kodnära utveckling
* Förmåga att se möjligheter i plattformen, inte bara i standardfunktionalitet



 Personliga egenskaper
 


* Analytisk, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Trivs med att jobba både operativt och strategiskt
* Prestigelös lagspelare med god kommunikativ förmåga
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift



  





**Mer information** 




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid på vårt kontor i Stockholm
 



 Du rapporterar till vår CDO och vi tillämpar hybrid arbetssätt.
 



 Sista ansökningsdag 19 maj 2026
 



 Bli en del av Polarn O. Pyret och bidra till ett arv som står sig över tid med hjälp av modern teknik, automation och AI.
 



 Vid frågor om rollen eller rekryteringsprocessen: charlotta.brandstedt@polarnopyret.se

title: Product Manager
description:
**We are looking for a commercially driven Product Manager to own and develop our Device-as-a-Service (DaaS) offering at Foxway CWS (Circular Workspace Solutions).** 




  





**About the role Device-as-a-Service (DaaS)** 
 is our hero product and a key driver of profitable growth within our circular lifecycle model. It combines hardware, lifecycle services, and financing into an integrated enterprise solution for Corporate and Public sector customers.
 



  





 As
 **Product Manager,** 
 you are accountable for the commercial and operational performance of the DaaS offering. You will define the product strategy and roadmap, set clear commercial guardrails, and continuously optimize profitability, scalability, and customer value across the full lifecycle.
 



  





 This is a strongly business-oriented role with clear responsibility for commercial performance. You will work cross-functionally with Sales, Finance, Operations, Marketing, Tech Centers, and Service Design to ensure that our DaaS offering is competitive, scalable, operationally robust, and financially sound.
 



  





 The role reports to VP Product & Services Management and is considered a key commercial function within Foxway CWS.
 



  





**You will:** 




  




* Own the commercial performance of DaaS, including margin targets, growth ambitions, and overall profitability.
* Define and continuously evolve the value proposition across prioritized enterprise customer segments.
* Set pricing logic, commercial frameworks, and profitability guardrails for new and existing deals in collaboration with Sales and Finance.
* Understand cost drivers and proactively drive margin improvements and scalable growth.
* Translate product strategy into clear execution priorities across sales, delivery, and operations.
* Drive structured performance follow-up using commercial and operational KPIs.
* Own and optimize the end-to-end customer journey to maximize growth, retention, and customer satisfaction (NPS).
* Ensure service quality standards, SLAs, and scalable delivery models.
* Support sales enablement, positioning, and commercial capability development.



  





 Success in this role is measured on profitability, growth, and customer satisfaction (NPS).
 



  





**We believe you bring** 




  




* 5+ years of experience in Product Management or a similar business-driven role within SaaS, hardware, lifecycle services, financing, or other service-heavy environments.
* Strong commercial mindset with experience driving revenue growth, margin improvement, pricing decisions, or business performance
* Formal P&L ownership is a great advantage.
* Experience working with cost structures, commercial models, and profitability levers in subscription, leasing, or service-based contexts.
* Proven ability to take ownership beyond roadmap — translating strategy into measurable financial and operational results.
* Experience working cross-functionally with Sales, Finance, and Operations in complex stakeholder environments.
* Structured, data-driven decision-making and ability to define and follow up on clear KPIs.
* Experience improving performance, scalability, or commercial processes in growing environments.



  





**Meritorious if you have:** 




  




* Experience in lifecycle services, hardware, leasing, financing, or asset-heavy business models.
* Experience working closely with enterprise sales teams and large B2B customers.
* Experience balancing commercial growth with operational scalability.



  





**To succeed in this role** 




  




* You think and act like a business owner.
* You are commercially sharp and outcome-focused.
* You are comfortable discussing pricing, margin structures, and deal frameworks with senior stakeholders.
* You balance growth ambitions with operational realities.
* You communicate clearly and influence across functions.



  





 This role requires on-site presence at least four (4) days per week to enable close collaboration with stakeholders and operations.
 



  





**Why join Foxway?** 




  




* Be part of a company that contributes to a more circular and sustainable future.
* Work in a culture that encourages ambition, collaboration, and learning.
* Gain opportunities for personal development and strategic career growth.



  





 We are reviewing applications on an ongoing basis so if this sounds like an opportunity you want to pursue, apply and we will get in touch with you!

title: Project Manager - Service Delivery
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, spacecraft consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC Space also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

 Are you fueled by a passion for people and the ambition to create an awesome workplace?
   

  

 Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey with us to help Earth benefit from space?
   

  

 If you answer yes to these questions, we invite you to seize the opportunity to make a significant impact as Project Manager in our Connect Service Delivery team. We are looking for a dedicated person who shares our core values of Customer passion, Care, Collaboration, Curiosity, and Courage.
   

  

**Requirements**
 As a Project Manager within our Ground Station Services, you will manage both customer-facing and internal projects connected to our global network of ground stations. These services support a wide range of satellite missions, including scientific, Earth observation, navigation, and telecom.
   

  

 The role involves acting as the main point of contact for customers during mission establishment, ensuring that requirements are translated into reliable and high-quality delivery. Close collaboration with engineering, operations, and commercial teams across multiple locations is a key part of the work.
   

  

 You bring experience from managing projects in an international and cross-functional environment, ideally within space, IT, telecom, or other technology-driven industries. Familiarity with structured project methodologies such as waterfall is expected, and experience working with agile ways of working is an advantage.
   

  

 You have a structured way of working and are comfortable planning, following up, and driving progress across multiple stakeholders. An understanding of both technical and commercial aspects of delivery is important, along with the ability to communicate clearly with both engineers and customers.
   

  

 You take ownership of your work, move things forward, and are comfortable challenging when needed to ensure progress and quality. Experience working with common project and collaboration tools such as Jira, Confluence, or MS Project is also part of your background.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Plan and lead projects from initial customer request through implementation and service delivery.
* Act as the main point of contact for customers during the mission establishment phase.
* Coordinate internal teams across engineering, operations, and commercial functions to ensure aligned delivery.
* Translate customer requirements into actionable plans together with technical teams.
* Manage risks, dependencies, and changes throughout the project lifecycle.
* Ensure that project goals, deliverables, timelines, and documentation are met according to SSC Space processes.
* Contribute to improving ways of working within project delivery.


**Benefits**
 We offer you
   

  

* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional Benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


  

  

 LOCATION
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based at our office in either Solna or Kiruna.
   

  

 fitness center, conference facilities, outdoor patios, and walking trails - designed to foster creativity and collaboration.
   

  

 FURTHER INFORMATION
   

  

 For questions regarding employment terms or union matters, please contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: af@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

 NEXT STEP
   

  

 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-05-17, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.
   

  

  

  

 WE HELP EARTH BENEFIT FROM SPACE
   

  

 SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 750 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Meet the Team
   

  

 Join Cisco's Webex Media engineering site in Stockholm, where we craft the meeting experience that connects people and businesses around the world. We are a highly motivated, startup‑like team within a global organization, combining the impact and resources of Cisco with the agility and camaraderie of a smaller group. Our work powers the shift to a hybrid workforce and aims to make people feel truly connected. You’ll find a friendly, supportive environment that celebrates creativity, growth, and a shared passion for building world‑class real‑time media experiences.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

* Bring new real‑time media features to life based on product requirements.
* Perform peer code reviews and automate development workflows and quality gates.
* Participate in agile ceremonies including daily stand‑ups, planning, releases, and retrospectives.
* Collaborate across teams to broaden technical and soft skills through training and mentoring.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* 7+ years of professional software development experience and a MSc (or equivalent) in Software Engineering or a related field.
* Proficiency in C/C++ with strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.
* Experience building native applications on Windows, macOS/iOS, Android (NDK), or Linux.
* Experience with media streaming and relevant protocols for real‑time applications.
* Professional verbal and written communication skills in English.
* Uses AI responsibly to accelerate development.
* Critically reviews AI-generated code before using it.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience designing cross‑platform solutions using appropriate patterns and build tools.
* Hands‑on with public cloud platforms (AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud).
* Experience with close‑to‑real‑time systems and performance‑sensitive code paths.
* Comfort with incremental development, testing, and A/B testing in production.
* Collaborative, friendly, and self‑directed; eager to learn and share knowledge.
* Steers AI effectively via context and prompt design.


 CollabHiring
   

  

 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Bid Management Assistant
description:
****Working at Mercell****
 At Mercell, we're on a mission to revolutionize public procurement, making it accessible and effortless for everyone involved. Imagine a world where public buyers and visionary suppliers come together seamlessly to make a great deal easier and shape the future. That's what we're all about.
   

  

 With a dynamic culture built on continuous growth, trust, and collaboration, Mercell offers an environment where your talents can thrive. You will be part of an international environment with ambitious and dedicated colleagues who are passionate about what they do and supported to be themselves.
   

  

 Together, let's shape the future and create real value for society, one innovative solution at a time.
   

  

****Your Mission****
 We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Bid Management Assistant to join our team. In this role, you will be the backbone of our bid operations, ensuring that the administrative and developmental aspects of our tender processes run like clockwork. You are not just a coordinator; you are a tech-savvy communicator who can translate customer requirements into compelling demonstrations and accurate documentation. If you are a self-starter with a genuine curiosity for technology and a passion for solving complex challenges within the public sector, we want to hear from you.
   

  

****Core responsibilities****
 Your primary mission is to streamline the bid lifecycle, from initial market reviews to the final submission.
   

  

* Bid Coordination & Admin: Manage the administrative workflow of bid activities, ensuring all documentation is organised, deadlines are met, and internal stakeholders are aligned.
* RFI & Market Reviews: Lead the preparation and drafting of responses for Requests for Information (RFIs) and market reviews, ensuring our value proposition is clearly articulated.
* Customer Demos: Prepare and deliver tailored product demonstrations based on specific customer requirements, showcasing how our solutions solve their unique pain points.
* Cross-functional Collaboration: Act as the bridge between sales, product, and technical teams. You will translate internal requests and technical specifications into actionable bid content.
* Data-driven Accuracy: Maintain high standards of data integrity across all bid documents, ensuring that every answer provided is accurate, up-to-date, and compliant with tender requirements.


****Required qualifications****
 To thrive in this role, you should possess a blend of structured project management skills and technical aptitude.
   

  

* Proven experience with bid or tender management.
* Ability to execute at pace and maintain high quality in an evolving, fast-moving environment.
* Good understanding of tender management processes.
* A natural interest in technology and the ability to quickly learn and demonstrate software solutions.
* Proficiency in Norwegian and/or Swedish language is required to manage regional tenders and communicate effectively with local stakeholders.
* Fluency in English (both written and spoken) is essential for internal collaboration and documentation.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Training in Bid Management or a background in Project Management.
* "Self-Starter" mentality, you don't wait for instructions; you identify gaps, ask the right questions, and take initiative.
* A genuine interest in navigating the unique challenges and regulatory frameworks of the public sector.
* A curious mind that enjoys digging into the "why" behind customer requirements to provide better solutions.


****Why to join us?****
 You will be part of a dynamic team where your contributions have a direct impact on our growth and success. We value engagement, transparency, and the drive to improve. Here, your ability to translate complex internal data into winning bid actions will be recognised and rewarded.
   

  

**Start date:** 
 As soon as possible
   

  

**Duration:** 
 Full time
   

  

**Workplace type:** 
 Hybrid - working onsite at the office min. 3 days and from home, balancing flexibility with collaboration
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

**Application deadline: 17th of May 2026.** 
 Make sure to submit your application as soon as possible - we will read applications and talk to potential candidates as we receive them
   

  

****What we offer****
 As a fast growing technology company, we are committed to taking care of our employees through initiatives such as hybrid work to support work-life balance, health and insurance plans (may differ per country/office), pension plans, paid parental leave, social happenings and competitive salary packages. Please see https://career.mercell.com/posts/our-perks-benefits to get more insights on what to expect of perks, benefits and culture when joining Mercell.
   

  

****Has this sparked your interest?****
 Then we can't wait to have you join our mission and looking forward to receiving your application!
   

  

* Mercell is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and experiences.
* Mercell handles all personal data in line with GDPR and our Privacy Policy.
* Mercell does not provide relocation support. We are seeking candidates who are already based in, or have existing work authorization for, the country where the role is located.
* Mercell may carry out background checks on applicants to verify information that appears on CVs and other documentation. This background check is carried out by an external party and is not carried out without the consent of the applicant. Current applicants will receive further information about this.

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
**Customer Success Manager to Alva Labs**
 Every company wants to hire the right people. Most of them are bad at it. The process runs on gut feelings, snap judgments, and CVs skimmed in 6 seconds. The result: missed talent, biased decisions, frustrated candidates.
   

  

 Alva exists to fix that. We build assessment tools grounded in psychometrics, structured interviews, and coding assessments. The Customer Success team is where that mission hits the real world, one customer at a time.
   

  

**The Company**
 Alva Labs is a Stockholm-based SaaS company. We've built a candidate assessment platform that combines psychometric science, data science, and an almost unreasonable obsession with candidate experience. Companies use it to make hiring decisions based on evidence instead of vibes.
   

  

 We're in the middle of launching our biggest product bet yet. The kind that changes the category. We've also sharpened our commercial focus toward larger, more complex organisations where the impact (and the deals) are bigger.
   

  

 The problem we're solving is genuinely interesting: psychological science meets statistics, wrapped in product design that candidates actually enjoy using. It also matters. The decisions our customers make with Alva shape people's careers and livelihoods.
   

  

 Perks? Flexible hours, hybrid setup (you decide what works), on-market salary and possibility to adjust your own compensation package (salary / pension / vacation days).
   

  

**The role**
 Customer Success is the beating heart of Alva. It's the team closest to our customers, the one feeding the richest insights back to Product, and the one that knows how to bridge the gap between science and practice.
   

  

 We're growing, and we need a CSM to join the team permanently. You'll own a portfolio of customers across sectors, sizes, and markets. Your job: be their commercial partner and the person they actually want to hear from. Relationship-building and business impact, bolted together.
   

  

 Here's what you'll spend your time on:
   

  

* Building real relationships with decision-makers and key stakeholders at your accounts. The kind where they see Alva as a partner in their hiring strategy.
* Talking to people at every level of an organisation. Understanding what they're trying to accomplish, what's blocking them, and what "success" looks like in their world.
* Driving adoption through trainings, Business Reviews backed by actual data, tailored recruitment processes, and building libraries of structured interview questions.
* Owning the commercial side: renewals, expansion, upsell. Growing revenue from your portfolio.
* Working across Sales, Product, People Science, and Support. CS doesn't operate in a silo here.
* Helping build out CS processes, playbooks, and best practices. The department is maturing; you'll shape how it works.
* Feeding customer insights back to Product so the roadmap reflects what customers actually need.


**Your first months**
 Research shows (did we mention we love science?) that a good start matters a lot when switching jobs. So here's what the first stretch looks like:
   

  

* A full walkthrough of the product and how we approach CS at Alva.
* Shadowing your colleagues' meetings, then picking up your own customers.
* Contributing to key projects across CS and the broader commercial team while you ramp up.
* Getting to know everyone. There'll be plenty of occasions for that.


**You**
 We care about the right person, not the right CV. That said, a few things would make us really happy:
   

  

* You've worked in Customer Success, Account Management, Sales, or a similar commercial role. B2B SaaS experience is ideal. We're open to both junior and more senior profiles.
* You have strong commercial instincts. You get how renewals and expansion work, and you know how to create value for customers in a way that also moves the business forward. This is the core of the role.
* You thrive when expectations are high. You've got the analytical chops and the social skills to match.
* You can handle speed, ambiguity, and change. You take ownership of your performance even when the path ahead is foggy.
* You communicate clearly and persuasively in both Swedish and English. Fluency in both is a requirement.
* You have strong analytical skills.
* You collaborate naturally across teams. No one here works alone.
* Bonus: experience in recruitment, talent acquisition, or HR tech.


**Your future colleagues**
 60+ people, 18+ nationalities, one shared obsession: making hiring fair and efficient. There's a lot of energy here, and a lot of talent.
   

  

 The CS team specifically? Never been a lovelier bunch to work with (speaking 100% objectively, of course). Deep knowledge, genuine service-mindedness, and enough laughter to keep things light. They're the reason our NRR grows and our customers stay happy.
   

  

**The hiring process**
 We claim to be experts in hiring. So here's what we've put together for you:
   

  

* Objective screening with Alva's tests (you'll retake in a supervised setting if you advance)
* First interview: what you know. Background, commercial skills, domain knowledge, learning ability.
* Second interview with an I/O psychologist: who you are. Drive, ownership, communication, collaboration, tolerance for change.
* Case exercise with the Hiring Manager: how you'd do the work. Think customer meeting prep, renewal conversations, that kind of thing.
* Background & ID check: yes, we take security seriously.
* Offer & bubbles. 🥂


**Come help us change how the world hires. Welcome to Alva labs.**

title: Informationssäkerhetsansvarig till Energiföretagen
description:
*Energibranschen står mitt i en omvälvande och spännande tid. Energisystemet ska dubbleras på bara några få årtionden och omställningen till ett fossilfritt samhälle tar sin utgångspunkt här. Energiföretagen Sverige samlar branschens aktörer och våra medlemsföretag arbetar varje dag för att nå Energiföretagen Sveriges vision: ”Hållbar energi för alla, alltid”. Energibranschen är avgörande för andra sektorers omställning och energifrågorna är nu i händelsernas mitt.*
 Har du erfarenhet av att arbeta med informationssäkerhet och dataskydd och vill ta ett helhetsansvar för att driva och utveckla arbetet framåt? Trivs du i en roll där du får kombinera strategiskt tänkande med operativt genomförande och samtidigt säkerställa att krav på efterlevnad upprätthålls? Då kan det här vara en tjänst för dig!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 I rollen som Informationssäkerhetsansvarig har du ett övergripande ansvar för organisationens arbete inom dataskydd och informationssäkerhet. Du agerar dataskyddsansvarig (DSA) och säkerställer att verksamheten lever upp till gällande regelverk, samtidigt som du driver utveckling och förbättring av arbetssätt, processer och styrning.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära IT och övriga verksamheten där du fungerar som ett stöd, bollplank och kravställare i frågor kopplade till informationssäkerhet och dataskydd. Rollen innebär ett tydligt mandat att identifiera brister och säkerställa att nödvändiga åtgärder vidtas. Rollen är bred och innefattar både strategiskt och operativt arbete, från att utveckla strukturer och ramverk till att genomföra kontroller, följa upp efterlevnad och hantera löpande frågor.
   

  

 I rollen ingår även att:
   

  

* driva och vidareutveckla organisationens GDPR-arbete samt säkerställa efterlevnad
* ansvara för implementering, förvaltning och utveckling av ISMS (Stratsys)
* driva, implementera och vidareutveckla arbetet kopplat till ISO 27001
* genomföra och följa upp kontroller samt säkerställa efterlevnad av regelverk
* vara stöd och rådgivare till verksamheten i dataskydds- och informationssäkerhetsfrågor
* hantera inkommande frågor och ärenden kopplade till dataskydd
* samverka med medlemsföretag och externa parter i informationssäkerhets- och regulatoriska frågor (exempelvis NIS2/CSL)
* omvärldsbevaka och identifiera utvecklingsbehov inom området


**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom exempelvis IT, informationssäkerhet, juridik eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* minst 4 års erfarenhet av arbete med informationssäkerhet och GDPR
* erfarenhet av att arbeta i en roll som DSA/DPO, CISO eller motsvarande ansvar
* erfarenhet av att självständigt driva, implementera och följa upp arbete kopplat till informationssäkerhet och dataskydd
* god kunskap om och erfarenhet av arbete med ramverk såsom ISO 27001 eller motsvarande. Erfarenhet av implementation/certifiering inom ISO27001 är önskvärt
* god systemvana och ett intresse för digitala verktyg, gärna erfarenhet av ISMS (exempelvis Stratsys)
* mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift samt goda kunskaper i engelska


 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet från regulatoriskt styrda verksamheter samt relevanta certifieringar inom informationssäkerhet eller dataskydd.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen är du strukturerad och har ett starkt eget driv. Du planerar och driver ditt arbete framåt på ett effektivt sätt och säkerställer att arbetet håller hög kvalitet.
   

  

 Du är analytisk och lösningsorienterad med förmåga att se både helhet och detaljer. Du är trygg i din kompetens och har integritet i ditt arbete, och har mod att ställa krav och stå upp för efterlevnad samtidigt som du är pedagogisk och har lätt för att samarbeta och skapa förtroende i organisationen.
   

  

 Vidare är du kommunikativ och relationsskapande, med en god förmåga att anpassa din kommunikation efter mottagare och skapa engagemang i frågor som rör informationssäkerhet och dataskydd.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig egenskaper.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Som anställd på Energiföretagen arbetar du i en kunskapsorganisation med ledande experter inom alla delar av energisystemet, och får arbeta med en av vår tids viktigaste frågor. Genom din roll får skapar du ett unikt nätverk med våra medlemsföretag och med representanter från hela energi-Sverige.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta och utgå från våra trevliga och nya lokaler vid Hötorget mitt i centrala Stockholm. Vi erbjuder möjlighet till distansarbete två - tre dagar i veckan. Energiföretagen Sverige erbjuder bra anställningsvillkor och personalförmåner såsom träning på arbetstid, friskvårdsbidrag och har kollektivavtal (branschavtal Energi). Vi tycker det är viktigt att våra medarbetare har en bra balans mellan arbetstid och fritid.
   

  

**Tillsättning**
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid och tillsättning sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Ansökan och frågor**
 Låter detta intressant? Skicka din ansökan redan idag! Vi hanterar ansökningar och intervjuar löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas före sista ansökningsdatum. Sista dag för ansökan är den 10 maj.
   

  

 Frågor om tjänsten besvaras av Kristoffer Sjökvist, IT-chef, mejl: kristoffer.sjokvist@energiforetagen.se, tfn: +46 8 677 25 63.
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare är för Unionen Mattias Jönsson 08-677 26 71 och
   

  

 för SACO Louise Marcelius, 08-677 28 27.
   

  

**Vill du veta mer om oss?**
*Läs mer om oss här:* 
*www.energiforetagen.se* 
*.*

title: Business Controller till IT-bolag i Liljeholmen
company: Andremo Finance - konsult & rekrytering av ekonomer, chefer & specialister
description:
**Business Controller** 




  





 Vill du arbeta nära affären, påverka beslut och få ett tydligt eget ansvarsområde i en växande organisation?
 



 Nu söker vi en Business Controller till ett av Sveriges ledande IT-bolag.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




  





 I rollen får du ett helhetsansvar för ett definierat delområde där du arbetar nära verksamheten. Du följer upp både konsultverksamhet och på sikt avtalsaffären, analyserar lönsamhet och bidrar med insikter som gör verklig skillnad. Det här är en bred och utvecklande roll där du inte bara analyserar – du är med och driver förbättringar, utmanar och utvecklar arbetssätt tillsammans med organisationen.
 



  





**Du kommer bland annat att:** 




  





 • Följa upp projekt, konsulttimmar och lönsamhet
 



 • Ta fram analyser, rapporter och presentationer
 



 • Stötta chefer och projektledare i affärsbeslut
 



 • Delta i budget, prognos och bokslutsarbete
 



 • Driva förbättringar och utveckla processer
 



  





**Vi tror att du:** 




  





 • Har ca 3–5 års erfarenhet inom controlling/ekonomi
 



 • Har god förståelse för redovisning och bokslut och har gjort bokslut självständigt tidigare
 



 • Är analytisk och trygg i Excel
 



 • Trivs nära verksamheten och gillar att ta egna initiativ
 



 • Är kommunikativ och bekväm i att presentera insikter
 



  





 Som person är du nyfiken, prestigelös och gillar att samarbeta. Du bidrar med energi, är lösningsorienterad och tycker om att vara där det händer.
 



  





**Om teamet** 




  





 Du blir en del av ett sammansvetsat controllerteam med hög kompetens och en prestigelös kultur där man stöttar varandra och delar kunskap. Rollen innebär också nära kontakt med affärsområdets ledning.
 



  





 📍 Placering: Liljeholmen (huvudsakligen på kontoret)
 



 📅 Start: Augusti 2026
 



  





 Låter det intressant – eller känner du någon som passar?
 



  





 Hör gärna av dig eller skicka ett meddelande så berättar jag mer!

title: ENGINEERS & MECHANICS - DAY AND NIGHTSHIFT
description:
Join SAS Line Maintenance at Arlanda Airport and help keep our fleet flying safely and efficiently. We maintain SAS aircraft (A320, A330, A350) and support other customers’ fleets.
   

  

 We are now looking for licensed aircraft engineers and experienced aircraft mechanics for both our day- and nightshifts.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Licensed Aircraft Engineer or experienced aircraft mechanic, you’ll be part of a dynamic team ensuring aircraft safety and reliability.
   

  

* Performing planned maintenance up to A-checks, including engine and landing gear replacements.
* Troubleshooting and rectifying faulty systems.
* Recording all activities in IT systems.


 What You Bring
   

  

**Must-have**
* Documented experience.
* Driver’s license.
* Strong English communication skills.
* High IT proficiency.


**Nice-to-have**
* EASA Part-66 License B1.1 and/or B2 with type rating.
* Type rating on A320, A330, and/or A350.
* Documented experience in line maintenance.
* Scandinavian language skills.
* Experience with AMOS.


 Why SAS
   

  

**We Make Your Journey Matter**
* Training: From human factors to type ratings, via SAS Technical Training.
* Career growth: Opportunities across SAS.
* Travel perks: Discounted tickets for you, family, and friends.
* Community: SAS Employee Club activities (skiing, golf, motor sports, and more).
* Benefits: Salary per collective and local agreements, plus access to Benify.


 Application Details
   

  

* Clean criminal record and proof of occupation for the past 5 years required.
* Drug and alcohol test before employment.
* Shift rotation covering 24/7/365.
* Apply via SAS Career Site with relevant documents.
* Questions (not applications): rekryteringsastech@sas.se
* Interviews ongoing. Deadline: 04MAY2026.

title: E-commerce Specialist
description:
Sales
   

  

 Permanent
   

  

**Job Description**
**Drive profitable growth Direct to consumer.**
*At Electrolux Group, a leading global appliance company, we strive every day to shape living for the better for our consumers, our people and our planet. We share ideas and collaborate so that together, we can develop solutions that deliver enjoyable and sustainable living.*
*Come, join us as you are. We believe diverse perspectives make us stronger and more innovative. In our global community of people from 100+ countries, we listen to each other, actively contribute and grow together.*
*Join us in our exciting quest to build the future home!*
**E-commerce Specialist**
 At Electrolux, we are on a journey to provide our consumers with simply outstanding experience across our business areas and through all channels where this role supports the evolving routes to market through D2C E-Commerce.
   

  

 We are now looking for an
 **E-commerce Specialist** 
 to join our central e-commerce team in Europe. This team’s core focus is to develop and leverage new routes to market and delivering profitable growth for Electrolux. As E-commerce Specialist, your mission will be to support the commercial team within Business Area Europe with the main objective to grow online sales for all our product categories.
   

  

 You will as E-commerce Specialist report to the Sub Channel Sales Manager and focus on delivering commercial toolbox structure and usage for
 **Focused Channel cross markets**
**Furthermore, you will be:**
* Acting as Superuser on the ecom back-end applications mastering the commercial toolbox cross all tools (CCv2, Dynamic Yield, ContentSquare etc)
* In close collaboration with key stakeholders help in supporting and driving markets commercial tasks related to assigned sub channel
* In collaboration with Sub Channel Sales Manager gather requirement and brief POs and consider input from PO as required
* In collaboration create training materials for new commercial features
* Together with Sub Channel Sales Manager support with clear communication around new releases (detailed documents, clear process on how to use or activate a new functionality)
* Together with Sub Channel Sales Manager execute and lead trainings on new commercial capabilities to secure business benefits.
* In close collaboration with key stakeholders support in executing on the campaign plans cross markets with applicable tools for the sub channel
* In close collaboration with team colleagues support in doing analysis and creating reports
* Collaborating with central and local sales, marketing, and IT to deliver the commercial agenda and objectives
